Method: 提出Context-Driven Decomposition (CDD)，一种推理时信念分解探测方法，作为可控检索冲突的干预机制。在Epi-Scale压力测试、TruthfulQA误解注入和跨模型重运行实验中进行验证。

Result: 发现三种模式：P1：对抗环境下标准RAG仅达15.0%准确率；P2：CDD提升准确性可跨模型家族迁移，但因果敏感性未迁移（Gemini达64.1%，Claude系列仅-3%~+7%）；P3：CDD在时间偏移和噪声干扰下分别达71.3%和69.9%。

Conclusion: 上下文遵从是RAG的结构性维度，可通过CDD进行探测和干预，与检索质量或单一方法鲁棒性问题区分开来。研究发布Epi-Scale基准以支持系统性研究。

Abstract: The Context-Compliance Regime in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) occurs when retrieved context dominates
  the final answer even when it conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Accuracy alone does not reveal
  how retrieved context causally shapes answers under such conflict. We introduce Context-Driven Decomposition
  (CDD), a belief-decomposition probe that operates at inference time and serves as an intervention mechanism for
  controlled retrieval conflict. Across Epi-Scale stress tests, TruthfulQA misconception injection, and cross-
  model reruns, CDD exposes three patterns. P1: context compliance is measurable in an upper-bound adversarial
  setting, where Standard RAG reaches 15.0% accuracy on TruthfulQA misconception injection (N=500). P2:
  adversarial accuracy gains transfer across model families: CDD improves accuracy on Gemini-2.5-Flash and on
  Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus, but rationale-answer causal coupling does not transfer. CDD reaches 64.1% mistake-
  injection causal sensitivity on Gemini-2.5-Flash, while sensitivities for all three Claude variants fall in the
  [-3%, +7%] range, suggesting that the Claude-side accuracy gains operate through a mechanism distinct from the
  explicit conflict-resolution trace. P3: explicit conflict decomposition improves robustness under temporal
  drift and noisy distractors, with CDD reaching 71.3% on temporal shifts and 69.9% on distractor evidence on the
  full Epi-Scale adversarial benchmark. These three patterns identify context-compliance as a structural axis
  along which standard RAG can be probed and intervened on, distinct from retrieval-quality or single-method
  robustness questions, and motivate releasing Epi-Scale for systematic study across model families and retrieval
  pipelines.

</details>


### [182] [Cross-Linguistic Transcription and Phonological Representation in the Huìtóngguǎnxì Huáyíyìyǔ](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14480)
*Ji-eun Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了15-16世纪明代《回通官话华夷译语》（HHY）的多语言注音体系，发现其主要注音（MT）适应汉语音节结构，而补充注音（ST）则标注非汉语特征，揭示该体系是系统性的语音近似方法而非简单投射。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究常将《回通官话华夷译语》视为孤立语言材料的集合，忽视了其作为多语言注音系统的内在一致性。本文旨在揭示该注音体系的结构性规律，并证明其对历史音韵学研究的价值，尤其是对记录匮乏的亚洲语言而言。

Method: 论文将HHY大部分内容数字化并与汉语音韵类别对齐，对已有各语言部分的重构进行批判性审阅并整合为统一比较数据库，重点分析八个语言部分中主注音（MT）和补充注音（ST）的跨语言规律。

Result: MT主要表示与当时汉语音节结构兼容的语音，ST则主要编码与汉语音系兼容性较差的语音特征。汉语音韵类别在对外注音中的使用比以往认为的更加灵活。HHY因此是一种相对系统化的语音近似方法，而非将汉语音系直接投射到非汉语语言。

Conclusion: HHY可以被分析为具有内在结构的注音系统，而非仅仅是词汇表的集合。更广泛地说，历史注音系统可以为历史音韵学提供宝贵证据，尤其对于历史记录有限的亚洲语言。

Abstract: Purpose: This study investigates the transcription principles underlying Huìtóngguǎnxì Huáyíyìyǔ (HHY), a series of multilingual glossaries compiled by the Ming government between the fifteenth and sixteenth centuries for interpreter training. The study treats HHY not as a collection of isolated language materials, but as a coherent multilingual transcription system representing spoken forms of non-Chinese languages through Chinese characters.
  Methods: A substantial portion of HHY was digitized and aligned with Chinese phonological categories. Previous reconstructions of individual language sections were critically reviewed and integrated into a unified comparative database. The analysis focuses on cross-linguistic regularities in Main Transcription (MT) and Supplementary Transcription (ST) across eight language sections.
  Results: MT generally represents sounds compatible with the Chinese syllable structure of the period, whereas ST mainly encodes phonetic features less compatible with Chinese phonology. The analysis further shows that Chinese phonological categories were used more flexibly in foreign-language transcription than previously assumed. HHY therefore functioned as a relatively systematic method of phonetic approximation rather than a direct projection of Chinese phonology onto non-Chinese languages.
  Conclusion: HHY can be analyzed as an internally structured transcription system rather than merely as a collection of glossaries. More broadly, the study demonstrates that historical transcription systems can provide valuable evidence for historical phonology, particularly for under-documented Asian languages with limited historical records.

</details>


### [183] [GroupMemBench: Benchmarking LLM Agent Memory in Multi-Party Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14498)
*Jingbo Yang,Kwei-Herng Lai,Xiaowen Wang,Shiyu Chang,Yaar Harari,Evgeniy Gabrilovich*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GroupMemBench基准，用于评估LLM智能体在多用户、多群组对话中的群体记忆能力。实验发现现有记忆系统在群体记忆任务上表现严重不足，最强系统仅达46.0%准确率，简单BM25基线甚至优于多数智能体记忆系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统及评测均局限于单用户对话场景，但实际部署中智能体常需处理多用户、多群组的群体对话。这种不匹配导致群体记忆的三个核心特性未被测量：群体动态、说话者归因信念追踪、面向听众的语言适应。

Method: 构建图驱动的多轮对话合成流水线，生成具有可控回复结构的多方对话；设计对抗性查询流水线，涵盖六大推理类别（多跳推理、知识更新、术语歧义、用户隐含推理、时间推理、放弃回答），迭代搜索高难度现实查询。

Result: 最强记忆系统仅达46.0%平均准确率，知识更新27.1%，术语歧义37.7%；简单BM25基线匹配或超越多数智能体记忆系统，表明当前记忆摄取方式破坏了群体记忆所需的结构与词汇特征。

Conclusion: 群体记忆问题远未解决，现有记忆系统的信息摄取机制丢失了关键的群体对话结构特征和词法特征，亟需为多用户场景重新设计记忆建模方法。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly serve as personal assistants and workplace collaborators, where their utility depends on memory systems that extract, retrieve, and apply information across long-running conversations. However, both existing memory systems and benchmarks are built around the dyadic, single-user setup, even though real deployments routinely span groups and channels with multiple users interacting with the agent and with each other. This mismatch leaves three properties of group memory unmeasured: (i) group dynamics that go beyond concatenated one-on-one chats, (ii) speaker-grounded belief tracking, where the per-user memory modeling is needed, and (iii) audience-adapted language, where Theory-of-Mind shifts produce role-specific vocabulary. We introduce GroupMemBench, a benchmark that exposes all three. A graph-grounded synthesis pipeline produces multi-party conversations with controllable reply structure and conditions each message on per-user personas and target audiences. An adversarial query pipeline then binds every question to a specific asker across six categories, spanning multi-hop reasoning, knowledge update, term ambiguity, user-implicit reasoning, temporal reasoning, and abstention, and iteratively searches challenging, realistic queries that reflect comprehensive memory capability. Benchmarking leading memory systems exposes a sharp collapse: the strongest one reaches only 46.0% average accuracy, with knowledge update at 27.1% and term ambiguity at 37.7%, while a simple BM25 baseline matches or exceeds most agent memory systems. This indicates current memory ingestion erases the structural and lexical features group memory depends on, leaving multi-user memory far from solved.

</details>


### [184] [Dimension-Level Intent Fidelity Evaluation for Large Language Models: Evidence from Structured Prompt Ablation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14517)
*GAng Peng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种维度级别的意图忠实度评估框架，通过对2880个输出（涵盖3种语言、3个任务领域、6个LLM）的结构提示消融研究，分别测量每个语义维度的结构恢复和意图忠实度。发现一个系统性的结构-忠实度分裂：中文输出中25.7%、英文输出中58.6%获得完美整体对齐分数但存在维度意图缺陷。人类评估证实了这种质量缺陷，且维度忠实度分数比整体分数更可靠。2520个消融单元的公共-私有分解描述了模型何时成功补偿缺失意图，权重扰动实验表明中度错位通常可被吸收而严重维度反转始终有害。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有整体评估分数能捕捉输出质量，但无法区分模型是否复现了用户请求的结构形式与是否保留了用户的具体意图，因此需要一种更细粒度的评估方法。

Method: 提出维度级别意图忠实度评估框架，通过结构化提示消融实验，在2880个输出上分别测量每个语义维度的结构恢复和意图忠实度；结合公共-私有分解分析模型补偿机制，以及权重扰动实验研究错位影响。

Result: 发现系统性结构-忠实度分裂：中文输出25.7%、英文输出58.6%整体对齐完美但存在维度意图缺陷；维度忠实度分数比整体分数更可靠地跟踪人类判断；中度错位可被吸收，严重维度反转始终有害。

Conclusion: 维度级别的意图忠实度评估是整体评估的必要补充，能够揭示整体分数掩盖的质量缺陷，更准确地评估LLM在用户特定任务上的输出质量。

Abstract: Holistic evaluation scores capture overall output quality but do not distinguish whether a model reproduced the structural form of a user's request from whether it preserved the user's specific intent. We propose a dimension-level intent fidelity evaluation framework, applied here through a structured prompt ablation study across 2,880 outputs spanning three languages, three task domains, and six LLMs, that separately measures structural recovery and intent fidelity for each semantic dimension. This framework reveals a systematic structural-fidelity split: among Chinese-language outputs with complete paired scores, 25.7% received perfect holistic alignment scores (GA=5) while exhibiting measurable dimensional intent deficits; among English-language outputs, this proportion rose to 58.6%. Human evaluation confirmed that these split-zone outputs represent genuine quality deficits and that dimensional fidelity scores track human judgements more reliably than holistic scores do. A public-private decomposition of 2,520 ablation cells characterises when models successfully compensate for missing intent and when they fail, while proxy annotation distinguishes prior inferability from default recoverability. A weight-perturbation experiment shows that moderate misalignment is typically absorbed, whereas severe dimensional inversion is consistently harmful. These findings demonstrate that dimension-level intent fidelity evaluation is a necessary complement to holistic assessment when evaluating LLM outputs for user-specific tasks.

</details>


### [185] [Language Generation as Optimal Control: Closed-Loop Diffusion in Latent Control Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14531)
*ZiYi Dong,Yuliang Huang,Weijian Deng,Xiangyang Ji,Liang Lin,Pengxu Wei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文将语言生成重新构架为随机最优控制问题，通过HJB方程近似求解与Flow Matching结合，提出Manta-LM模型，实现了高保真、高效率的并行文本生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归和扩散模型存在效率-保真度悖论、不可逆误差传播、优化可处理性及保真度等问题，缺乏统一的理论视角来解释这些局限性。

Method: 将语言生成建模为随机最优控制问题，近似求解HJB方程得到闭环最优策略；利用Flow Matching作为最优轨迹求解器，在整流潜在控制空间中通过全局积分算子（Manta-LM）逼近全局向量场。

Result: 在语言建模和条件生成任务上取得了强性能，展现出更优的稳定性、效率和可控性。

Conclusion: 通过最优控制框架统一分析了现有模型的局限性，并提出Manta-LM模型有效解决了高保真文本生成与高效并行采样之间的矛盾。

Abstract: This work reformulates language generation as a stochastic optimal control problem, providing a unified theoretical perspective to analyze autoregressive and diffusion models and explain their limitations (Efficiency-Fidelity Paradox, Irreversibility Error Propagation, Optimization Tractability and Fidelity) in terms of combination of trajectory singularity, adjoint state vanishing, and gradient absence. To address these issues, we approximate the solution to the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation, yielding an optimal policy that acts as a closed-loop controller. To bypass the intractability of directly solving the HJB PDE, we employ Flow Matching as the optimal trajectory solver within the rectified latent control space. This allows our Manta-LM with Global Integral Operator to approximate the global vector field, effectively realizing a model that simultaneously achieves high-fidelity text generation and efficient, low-cost parallel sampling. Empirically, our method achieves strong performance on language modeling and conditional generation tasks, while exhibiting improved stability, efficiency, and controllability.

</details>


### [186] [Learning from Failures: Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization with Verifiable Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14539)
*Mengjie Ren,Jie Lou,Boxi Cao,Xueru Wen,Hongyu Lin,Xianpei Han,Le Sun,Xing Yu,Yaojie Lu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CIPO方法，通过将RLVR训练中的失败轨迹转化为修正导向的监督信号，显著提升了LLM在数学推理和代码生成任务上的推理与纠错能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR训练中稀疏的二元奖励和弱信用分配导致优化信号模糊，且未能充分利用失败轨迹中的有用信息。

Method: CIPO将策略自身的失败轨迹转化为修正监督样本，与标准RLVR目标联合优化，无需依赖任何外部信号。

Result: 在11个数学推理和代码生成基准上，CIPO一致且显著优于强基线，并在推理性能和纠错能力上均有提升，pass@K指标也更强。

Conclusion: CIPO提升了模型的**内在推理能力**，而不仅仅是重新分配已有正确答案上的概率质量。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. However, RLVR training is often hindered by sparse binary rewards and weak credit assignment, resulting in ambiguous optimization signals and underutilization of the useful information embedded in failed trajectories. To address this challenge, we propose Correction-Oriented Policy Optimization (CIPO), a simple and effective extension to RLVR that converts on-policy failed trajectories into correction-oriented supervision, without relying on any external signals. By jointly optimizing correction samples derived from the model's own failed attempts together with the standard RLVR objective, CIPO improves learning effectiveness while explicitly enhancing the model's ability to correct its own errors. Extensive experiments across 11 benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that CIPO consistently and significantly outperforms strong baselines in both reasoning and correction performance. Moreover, CIPO yields stronger pass@K gains, indicating that it improves the model's intrinsic reasoning capacity rather than merely redistributing probability mass over existing correct answers.

</details>


### [187] [Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14570)
*Artem Vazhentsev,Vladislav Smirnov,David Li,Maxim Panov,Timothy Baldwin,Artem Shelmanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统性研究大语言扩散模型（LLDM）的不确定性量化（UQ）问题，提出基于迭代去噪过程的轻量级零样本不确定性信号，在不牺牲效率的前提下实现可靠的幻觉检测，计算开销降低高达100倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言扩散模型（LLDM）作为自回归模型的高效替代方案，虽推理速度更快但仍存在幻觉问题。现有UQ方法依赖于自回归分解或昂贵的重复采样，与LLDM的高效特性不兼容，亟需为这一新范式设计专属的不确定性量化方法。

Method: 提出三种轻量级零样本不确定性信号：中间生成、token重掩码动态和去噪复杂度。进一步将SOTA UQ方法适配到LLDM，通过结合掩码扩散似然与基于轨迹的语义不相似度，并证明期望轨迹不相似度下界约束掩码扩散训练目标，可作为不确定性分数。

Result: 在三个任务、八个数据集和两个模型上的综合实验表明，所提方法达到与最强基于采样的基线相当的性能，同时计算开销降低了多达100倍。

Conclusion: 证明了LLDM能够同时实现快速推理和可靠的幻觉检测，打破了效率与安全性之间的权衡。

Abstract: Large Language Diffusion Models (LLDMs) are emerging as an alternative to autoregressive models, offering faster inference through higher parallelism. Similar to autoregressive LLMs, they remain prone to hallucinations, making reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) crucial for safe deployment. However, existing UQ methods are fundamentally misaligned with this new paradigm: they assume autoregressive factorization or use expensive repeated sampling, negating the efficiency of LLDMs. In this work, we present the first systematic study of UQ for LLDMs and propose lightweight, zero-shot uncertainty signals derived from the iterative denoising process, leveraging intermediate generations, token remasking dynamics, and denoising complexity. We further adapt a state-of-the-art UQ method to LLDMs by combining masked diffusion likelihoods with trajectory-based semantic dissimilarity. We prove that expected trajectory dissimilarity lower bounds the masked diffusion training objective, which motivates its usage as an uncertainty score. Comprehensive experiments across three tasks, eight datasets, and two models show that our method achieves a great cost-performance trade-off: it approaches the strongest sampling-based baselines while incurring up to 100x lower computational overhead. Our work demonstrates that LLDMs can deliver both fast inference and reliable hallucination detection simultaneously.

</details>


### [188] [EndPrompt: Efficient Long-Context Extension via Terminal Anchoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14589)
*Han Tian,Luxuan Chen,Xinran Chen,Rui Kong,Fang Wang,Jiamin Chen,Jinman Zhao,Yuchen Li,Jiashu Zhao,Shuaiqiang Wang,Haoyi Xiong,Dawei Yin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EndPrompt是一种仅需短序列训练即可实现大语言模型长上下文扩展的方法，通过将短上下文作为第一段、终端提示作为第二段并分配靠近目标长度的位置索引，在短物理序列中同时引入局部和长距离相对位置距离。在LLaMA系列模型上从8K扩展到64K上下文窗口，RULER得分76.03，LongBench平均最高，超越了全长度微调和现有方法，且计算成本显著更低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型扩展上下文窗口通常需要在目标长度上训练，导致二次方的内存和计算成本，使得长上下文适配昂贵且难以复现。作者挑战了"密集长序列训练是可靠上下文窗口扩展的必要条件"这一主流假设，旨在用稀疏位置监督实现有效的上下文扩展。

Method: 提出两段式构造方法：保留原始短上下文作为完整的第一个片段，附加一个简短的终端提示作为第二个片段，并为其分配接近目标上下文长度的位置索引。这样在短物理序列中同时包含了局部和长距离相对位置距离，同时保持了训练文本的语义连续性。结合旋转位置编码和伯恩斯坦不等式进行理论分析，证明位置插值对注意力函数施加了严格的平滑性约束。

Result: 在LLaMA系列模型上将上下文窗口从8K扩展到64K，EndPrompt取得了76.03的平均RULER分数和LongBench最高平均分，超越了LCEG（72.24）、LongLoRA（72.95）和全长度微调（69.23），同时计算量显著更低。

Conclusion: 长上下文泛化可以通过稀疏位置监督实现，密集长序列训练并非上下文窗口扩展的必要条件。该发现挑战了现有主流认知，为高效长上下文适配提供了新范式。

Abstract: Extending the context window of large language models typically requires training on sequences at the target length, incurring quadratic memory and computational costs that make long-context adaptation expensive and difficult to reproduce. We propose EndPrompt, a method that achieves effective context extension using only short training sequences. The core insight is that exposing a model to long-range relative positional distances does not require constructing full-length inputs: we preserve the original short context as an intact first segment and append a brief terminal prompt as a second segment, assigning it positional indices near the target context length. This two-segment construction introduces both local and long-range relative distances within a short physical sequence while maintaining the semantic continuity of the training text--a property absent in chunk-based simulation approaches that split contiguous context. We provide a theoretical analysis grounded in Rotary Position Embedding and the Bernstein inequality, showing that position interpolation induces a rigorous smoothness constraint over the attention function, with shared Transformer parameters further suppressing unstable extrapolation to unobserved intermediate distances. Applied to LLaMA-family models extending the context window from 8K to 64K, EndPrompt achieves an average RULER score of 76.03 and the highest average on LongBench, surpassing LCEG (72.24), LongLoRA (72.95), and full-length fine-tuning (69.23) while requiring substantially less computation. These results demonstrate that long-context generalization can be induced from sparse positional supervision, challenging the prevailing assumption that dense long-sequence training is necessary for reliable context-window extension. The code is available at https://github.com/clx1415926/EndPrompt.

</details>


### [189] [SciPaths: Forecasting Pathways to Scientific Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14600)
*Eric Chamoun,Yizhou Chi,Yulong Chen,Rui Cao,Zifeng Ding,Michalis Korakakis,Andreas Vlachos*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出发现路径预测任务，构建SciPaths基准（262条专家标注+2444条银级路径），评估发现模型仅达0.189 F1，核心方法依赖最难恢复，揭示科学推理瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI4Science基准侧重于引文预测、文献检索或想法生成，忽略科学进步中使能贡献的依赖关系。

Method: 定义发现路径预测任务，从目标贡献回溯识别使能贡献并锚定已有文献；构建SciPaths基准（专家标注+自动构建），评估多种语言模型。

Result: 最佳模型在严格语义匹配下仅达0.189 F1，核心方法依赖最难恢复；提供黄金使能贡献时，锚定性能显著提升。

Conclusion: SciPaths将评估转向科学预测中缺失的能力——从目标贡献逆向推理至使能科学构建块和已有文献依赖。

Abstract: Scientific progress depends on sequences of enabling contributions, yet existing AI4Science benchmarks largely focus on citation prediction, literature retrieval, or idea generation rather than the dependencies that make progress possible. In this paper, we introduce discovery pathway forecasting: given a target scientific contribution and the prior literature available at a specified time, the task is to (1) identify the enabling contributions required to realize it and (2) ground each in prior work when such prior work exists. We present SciPaths, a benchmark of 262 expert-annotated gold pathways and 2,444 silver pathways constructed from machine learning and natural language processing papers, where each pathway records enabling contributions, roles, rationales, and prior-work groundings or unmapped decisions. Evaluating frontier and open-weight language models, we find that the best model reaches only 0.189 F1 under strict semantic matching, with core methodological dependencies hardest to recover. Prior-work grounding improves substantially when gold enabling contributions are provided, showing that decomposition quality is a major bottleneck for end-to-end pathway recovery. SciPaths therefore shifts evaluation toward a missing capability in scientific forecasting: reasoning backward from a target contribution to the enabling scientific building blocks and prior-work dependencies that make it feasible.

</details>


### [190] [AI-assisted cultural heritage dissemination: Comparing NMT and glossary-augmented LLM translation in rock art documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14679)
*Vicent Briva-Iglesias,María Ferre-Fernández*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文比较了三种英西机器翻译方案（DeepL、Gemini-Simple、Gemini-RAG）在岩画学术文本中的效果，发现基于术语库增强的Gemini-RAG在术语准确率（81.4%）和整体翻译质量上均优于其他方案，为文化遗产机构提供了一种低成本的术语控制翻译策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文化遗产机构需要多语言传播，但预算和人力有限；在岩画等术语密集型领域，翻译中的术语错误会误导非专业读者并降低内容复用价值，因此需要低成本、易操作的术语控制翻译方法。

Method: 以西班牙语岩画学术文本为源材料，比较三种英译MT方案：DeepL（强NMT基线）、Gemini-Simple（LLM+基础提示）、Gemini-RAG（同一LLM+术语库增强提示）。采用PEARMUT框架进行人工评估，包括多路直接评估（0-100分）和受限MQM分类的术语审计。

Result: Gemini-RAG术语精确匹配准确率最高（81.4%），优于Gemini-Simple（69.1%）和DeepL（64.4%）；整体翻译质量方面，Gemini-RAG（平均DA 85.3）与Gemini-Simple（85.2）相当，均优于DeepL（80.3）。

Conclusion: 术语库增强提示是一种低开销的术语控制方法，能有效提升文化遗产翻译质量；前提是机构能维护少量的术语资源并建立轻量级评估流程。

Abstract: Cultural heritage institutions increasingly disseminate research and interpretive materials globally, but multilingual dissemination is constrained by limited budgets and staffing. In terminology-dense domains such as rock art, translation quality depends on accurate, consistent specialised terms, and small lexical errors can mislead non-specialists and reduce reuse. We compare three English MT setups for a Spanish academic rock art text, focusing on simple, operationally feasible interventions rather than complex model-side modifications: (1) DeepL as a strong NMT baseline, (2) Gemini-Simple (LLM with a basic prompt), and (3) Gemini-RAG (the same LLM with glossary-augmented prompting via term-pair retrieval). Using PEARMUT, we conduct a human evaluation via (i) multi-way Direct Assessment (0--100) and (ii) targeted terminology auditing with a restricted MQM taxonomy. Gemini-RAG yields the highest exact-match terminology accuracy (81.4\%), versus Gemini-Simple (69.1\%) and DeepL (64.4\%), while preserving overall quality (mean DA 85.3 Gemini-RAG vs. 85.2 Gemini-Simple), outperforming DeepL (80.3). These results show that glossary-augmented prompting is a low-overhead way to improve terminology control in cultural-heritage translation if institutions maintain minimal terminology resources and lightweight evaluation procedures.

</details>


### [191] [Mechanical Enforcement for LLM Governance:Evidence of Governance-Task Decoupling in Financial Decision Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14744)
*José Manuel de la Chica Rodríguez,Carlos Martí-González*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出在受监管的金融工作流中，仅靠文本策略让LLM自我治理存在委托-代理失效问题。作者引入五项治理指标，在合成银行业务中对比文本治理与机械执行四种原语。结果表明：机械执行将治理违规率降低73%，任务准确率从MCC 0.43提升至0.88，核心在于架构分离——将清晰决策移出模型控制。因果消融证实每种原语均不可或缺。主要发现是治理-任务解耦：文本治理在结构压力下双重退化，而机械执行即使任务性能下降仍可保持治理质量。说明准确率不能作为受监管AI系统中治理的充分代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估只度量任务准确率，但未检查治理是否在决策理由层面约束了模型行为——而受监管决策必须可审计。文本策略治理存在模型既当球员又当裁判的根本性缺陷。

Method: 提出五项理由层级的治理指标；设计四种机械执行原语（在模型解释循环之外运作）；在合成银行业务场景中对比纯文本治理与机械执行；进行因果消融实验验证各原语必要性。

Result: 纯文本治理下27%的延迟决策无有效信息；机械执行使该比率降低73%，延迟决策信息含量翻倍以上，任务准确率从MCC 0.43提升至0.88。机械执行下LLM生成理由的CDL与文本治理相当——改进源于将清晰决策移出模型控制。

Conclusion: 治理与任务是两个正交维度：准确率不能作为治理质量的充分代理。机械执行通过架构分离实现治理-任务解耦，在压力下仍能保持治理质量。

Abstract: Large language models in regulated financial workflows are governed by natural-language policies that the same model interprets, creating a principal--agent failure: outputs can appear compliant without being compliant. Existing evaluation measures task accuracy but not whether governance constrains behaviour at the decision rationale level -- where regulated decisions must be auditable. We introduce five governance metrics that quantify policy compliance at the rationale level and apply them in a synthetic banking domain to compare text-only governance against mechanical enforcement: four primitives operating outside the model's interpretive loop. Under text-only governance, 27% of deferrals carry no decision-relevant information. Mechanical enforcement reduces this rate by 73%, more than doubles deferral information content, and raises task accuracy from MCC~$0.43$ to $0.88$. The improvement is driven by architectural separation: LLM-generated rationales under mechanical enforcement show comparable CDL to text-only governance -- the gain comes from removing clear-cut decisions from the model's control. A causal ablation confirms that each primitive is individually necessary. Our central finding is a governance-task decoupling: under structural stress, text-only governance degrades on both dimensions simultaneously, whereas mechanical enforcement preserves governance quality even as task performance drops. This implies that governance and task evaluation are distinct axes: accuracy is not a sufficient proxy for governance in regulated AI systems.

</details>


### [192] [Video2GUI: Synthesizing Large-Scale Interaction Trajectories for Generalized GUI Agent Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14747)
*Weimin Xiong,Shuhao Gu,Bowen Ye,Zihao Yue,Lei Li,Feifan Song,Sujian Li,Hao Tian*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Video2GUI框架，从互联网视频自动提取GUI交互轨迹，构建了包含1200万条交互轨迹的WildGUI数据集（覆盖1500+应用），预训练后使模型在GUI基准上提升5-20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GUI数据集依赖昂贵的人工标注且局限于狭窄领域，缺乏大规模、多样化的训练数据，限制了GUI智能体的泛化能力。

Method: 提出Video2GUI全自动框架，采用粗到细的过滤策略从无标注互联网视频中识别高质量GUI教程视频，并将其转换为结构化的智能体交互轨迹。在5亿视频元数据上应用该流程构建WildGUI数据集。

Result: 构建了包含1200万交互轨迹、覆盖1500+应用/网站的WildGUI数据集；Qwen2.5-VL和Mimo-VL预训练后在多个GUI基准上提升5-20%，达到或超越SOTA。

Conclusion: 自动化数据构建方法有效解决了GUI训练数据稀缺问题，将开源数据和代码以推动GUI智能体研究。

Abstract: Recent advances in multimodal large language models have driven growing interest in graphical user interface (GUI) agents, yet their generalization remains constrained by the scarcity of large-scale training data spanning diverse real-world applications. Existing datasets rely heavily on costly manual annotations and are typically confined to narrow domains. To address this challenge, we propose Video2GUI, a fully automated framework that extracts grounded GUI interaction trajectories directly from unlabeled Internet videos. Video2GUI employs a coarse-to-fine filtering strategy to identify high-quality GUI tutorial videos and convert them into structured agent trajectories. Applying this pipeline to 500 million video metadata entries, we construct WildGUI, a large-scale dataset containing 12 million interaction trajectories spanning over 1,500 applications and websites. Pre-training Qwen2.5-VL and Mimo-VL on WildGUI yields consistent improvements of 5-20% across multiple GUI grounding and action benchmarks, matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance. We will release both the WildGUI dataset and the Video2GUI pipeline to support future research of GUI agents.

</details>


### [193] [Non-linear Interventions on Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14749)
*Sangwoo Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种非线性干预框架，突破了线性表示假设的限制，能够对非线性流形编码的特征进行干预，并通过隐式特征学习实现更精确的模型控制，在拒绝绕道操控任务中优于线性基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有干预方法局限于线性表示假设，只能处理线性编码的特征，无法触及沿非线性流形编码的特征，限制了LLM内部表示理解的深度和干预的精确性。

Method: 提出一种通用的干预形式化框架，自然地扩展到非线性表示特征；同时设计了一个学习流程，支持对缺乏直接输出签名的隐式特征进行干预。

Result: 在拒绝绕道操控（refusal bypass steering）任务上验证，通过对控制拒绝行为的非线性特征进行干预，该方法比线性基线方法实现了更精确的模型操控。

Conclusion: 非线性干预框架能更精确地操控LLM行为，突破了线性表示假设的局限，为理解和干预模型内部表示提供了更通用的方法。

Abstract: Intervention is one of the most representative and widely used methods for understanding the internal representations of large language models (LLMs). However, existing intervention methods are confined to linear interventions grounded in the Linear Representation Hypothesis, leaving features encoded along non-linear manifolds beyond their reach. In this work, we introduce a general formulation of intervention that extends naturally to non-linearly represented features, together with a learning procedure that further enables intervention on implicit features lacking a direct output signature. We validate our framework on refusal bypass steering, where it steers the model more precisely than linear baselines by intervening on a non-linear feature governing refusal.

</details>


### [194] [Streaming Speech-to-Text Translation with a SpeechLLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14766)
*Titouan Parcollet,Shucong Zhang,Xianrui Zheng,Rogier C. van Dalen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于LLM的实时流式语音翻译架构，模型不仅能输出翻译文本，还能自主判断何时已收到足够音频，在1-2秒延迟下达到接近非流式基线的翻译质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音翻译系统存在两大问题：一是级联架构中语音识别和文本翻译分离导致错误累积；二是现有的SpeechLLM不支持真正的流式处理，要么等待完整音频，要么以固定间隔输出，不适合实时应用。

Method: 提出LLM-based架构，模型不仅学习生成输出token，还学习自主判断是否已收集足够音频用于翻译输出。利用输入语音和输出文本的自动对齐进行训练。

Result: 在多种语言对上，系统达到接近非流式基线的翻译质量，且延迟仅为1-2秒。

Conclusion: 实现了真正的流式语音到文本翻译，在保持翻译质量的同时大幅降低延迟，为实时语音翻译应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Normally, a system that translates speech into text consists of separate modules for speech recognition and text-to-text translation. Combining those tasks into a SpeechLLM promises to exploit paralinguistic information in the speech and to reduce cascaded errors. But existing SpeechLLM systems are slow since they do not work in a real streaming fashion: they wait for a complete utterance of audio before outputting a translation, or output tokens at fixed intervals, which is not suitable for real applications. This work proposes an LLM-based architecture for real streaming speech-to-text translation. The LLM learns not just to emit output tokens, but also to decide whether it has seen enough audio to do so. The system is trained using automatic alignments of the input speech and the output text. In experiments on different language pairs, the system achieves a translation quality close to the non-streaming baseline, but with a latency of only 1-2 seconds.

</details>


### [195] [Graphs of Research: Citation Evolution Graphs as Supervision for Research Idea Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14790)
*Songyang Gao,Yinghui Xia,Siyi Liu,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Graphs of Research (GoR)，一种通过构建论文演化有向无环图（DAG）来监督微调LLM以生成研究想法的方法，在ML/NLP领域取得了SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成研究想法的方法主要依赖静态文献检索或复杂提示工程，忽视了参考文献之间的结构关系，导致生成的想法缺乏对领域演化脉络的深入理解。

Method: GoR方法为每篇种子论文提取2-hop参考文献邻域，从引用位置、引用频率、前驱链接和发表时间四个维度推导文献间关系，构建论文演化DAG。在此基础上，对Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M进行监督微调，输入包含引文图、边信号、参考文献信息和任务定义的结构化文本提示，预测种子论文的研究想法。

Result: 在ML/NLP五大顶会构建的498/50/50训练/验证/测试集上，GoR-SFT在LLM裁判锦标赛中击败了gpt-4o驱动的基线方法，达到了SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 引用演化图作为监督信号能有效提升LLM生成研究想法的质量，降低了将引文演化图用于自动化科学创新的门槛。

Abstract: Research idea generation is the innovation-driving step of automated scientific research. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown potential for automating idea generation at scale. However, existing methods mainly condition LLMs on eliciting idea generation through static retrieval of relevant literature or complex prompt engineering, without discarding the structural relations among references. We propose Graphs of Research (GoR), a supervised fine-tuning method that extracts a 2-hop reference neighborhood for each seed paper, derives the relations among those references from citation position, frequency, predecessor links, and publication time, and organizes them into a paper-evolution directed acyclic graph (DAG). We construct an automated extraction pipeline that draws data from five major ML/NLP venues, comprising 498/50/50 train/validation/test seed papers and approximately 7,600 cited references. Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M is fine-tuned on a structured-text prompt that includes the citation graph, edge signals, reference information, and task definition to predict the idea for the seed paper. Across head-to-head LLM-judge tournaments against gpt-4o-driven baselines, GoR-SFT achieves SOTA, demonstrating the effectiveness of citation-evolution graphs as supervision signal for LLM-based idea generation. We hope that this reduces the barrier for citation evolution graphs as a supervision, accelerating automated scientific innovation.

</details>


### [196] [Conversion of Lexicon-Grammar tables to LMF. Application to French](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14816)
*Eric Laporte,Elsa Tolone,Mathieu Constant*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次将法语动词的Lexicon-Grammar表格转换为LMF格式，实现了这一重要词汇句法资源的标准化和互操作性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Lexicon-Grammar是法语重要的词汇句法资源，但缺乏互操作性标准格式，需要将其转换为LMF标准以促进NLP词典的标准化和可互操作性。

Method: 将Lexicon-Grammar中法语动词的表格转换为LMF格式，分析转换过程中的主要困难，并描述最终生成的资源。

Result: 成功完成了首次将Lexicon-Grammar法语动词表转换为LMF格式的实验，并分析了转换中的关键难点。

Conclusion: 该转换使得Lexicon-Grammar能够在不同NLP上下文中被使用，推动了法语词汇资源的标准化进程。

Abstract: We describe the first experiment of conversion of Lexicon-Grammar tables for French verbs into the Lexical Markup Framework (LMF) format. The Lexicon-Grammar of the French language is currently one of the major sources of lexical and syntactic information for French. Its conversion into an interoperable representation format according to the LMF standard makes it usable in different contexts, thus contributing to the standardization and interoperability of natural language processing dictionaries. We briefly introduce the Lexicon-Grammar and the derived dictionaries; we analyse the main difficulties faced during the conversion; and we describe the resulting resource.

</details>


### [197] [Tokenizer Fertility and Zero-Shot Performance of Foundation Models on Ukrainian Legal Text: A Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14890)
*Volodymyr Ovcharov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 对七种大模型在乌克兰法律文本上的分词效率和零样本性能进行了系统基准测试，发现分词效率差异达1.6倍，NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3以更低成本超越参数更大的模型，且少样本学习反而导致性能下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乌克兰法律文本的分词效率在不同基础模型间差异显著，但此前缺乏针对该领域的系统性比较研究。

Method: 选取来自五个提供商的七种模型，基于乌克兰国家登记处（EDRSR）的273份经过验证的法院判决，测量分词器生育率（tokenizer fertility）以及在三个任务上的零样本性能。

Result: (1) 分词效率差异达1.6倍，Qwen3比Llama系列多消耗60%的token；(2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B) 综合得分最高（83.1），在API成本仅为1/3的情况下超越参数大5.6倍的Mistral Large 3；(3) 少样本提示导致性能下降高达26个百分点，且经消融实验确认是乌克兰语示例本身的问题。

Conclusion: 实践建议：模型选择前应先分析分词器效率；对于形态丰富的语言，零样本比少样本更可靠。

Abstract: Foundation models tokenize Ukrainian legal text with vastly different efficiency, yet no systematic comparison exists for this domain. We benchmark seven models from five providers on 273 validated court decisions from Ukraine's state registry (EDRSR), measuring tokenizer fertility and zero-shot performance on three tasks. Three findings emerge. (1) Tokenizer fertility varies 1.6x: Qwen3 models consume 60% more tokens than Llama-family models on identical input, directly reducing API cost. (2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B) achieves the highest composite score (83.1), outperforming Mistral Large 3 (675B total, 41B active) -- a model with 5.6x more total parameters and 3.4x more active parameters per token -- at one-third the API cost. (3) Few-shot prompting degrades performance by up to 26 percentage points; stratified and prompt-sensitivity ablations confirm this is intrinsic to Ukrainian-language demonstrations, not an artifact of example selection. For practitioners: tokenizer analysis should precede model selection, and zero-shot is a more reliable default than few-shot for morphologically rich languages.

</details>


### [198] [Chain-of-Procedure: Hierarchical Visual-Language Reasoning for Procedural QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14928)
*Guanhua Chen,Yutong Yao,Shenghe Sun,Ci-Jun Gao,Shudong Liu,Lidia S. Chao,Feng Wan,Derek F. Wong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ProcedureVQA基准测试，用于评估视觉-语言模型在程序性问答任务中的表现，并设计了Chain-of-Procedure（CoP）推理框架，通过分层检索、语义分解和步骤生成，有效提升了模型在下一动作预测上的准确率（最高提升13%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在标准图文任务上表现优异，但在视觉程序问答（VP-QA）这一实用场景——用户上传中间状态图片查询下一步操作——尚未被充分探索和评估。

Method: 提出Chain-of-Procedure (CoP)分层推理框架：①利用视觉线索检索相关指令；②通过语义分解细化步骤；③生成下一步动作。

Result: 在6种VLM上验证，CoP相比标准基线方法取得最高13%的绝对性能提升。

Conclusion: 当前VLM在VP-QA任务上存在跨模态检索不足和图文粒度不对齐两大局限，CoP框架能有效缓解这些问题。

Abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results on standard image-text tasks, yet their potential for visual procedure question answering (VP-QA) remains largely unexplored. VP-QA presents unique challenges where users query next-step actions by uploading images for intermediate states of complex procedures. To systematically evaluate VLMs on this practical task, we propose ProcedureVQA, a novel multimodal benchmark specifically designed for visual procedural reasoning. Through comprehensive analysis, we identify two critical limitations in current VLMs: inadequate cross-modal retrieval of structured procedures given visual states, and misalignment between image sequence granularity and textual step decomposition. To address these issues, we present Chain-of-Procedure (CoP), a hierarchical reasoning framework that first retrieves relevant instructions using visual cues, then performs step refinement through semantic decomposition, and finally generates the next step. Experiments across six VLMs demonstrate CoP's effectiveness, achieving up to 13% absolute improvement over standard baselines.

</details>


### [199] [Performance-Driven Policy Optimization for Speculative Decoding with Adaptive Windowing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14978)
*Jie Jiang,Xing Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PPOW框架，通过强化学习将投机解码中的草稿模型优化从token级别提升到窗口级别，在多个模型和基准上实现6.29-6.52的平均接受长度和3.39-4.36倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有投机解码中，草稿模型仍使用token级监督训练，但投机效率本质上是窗口级和前缀敏感的，早期不匹配会导致整个窗口失效，需要将优化目标对齐到窗口级别。

Method: 提出PPOW框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 成本感知加速奖励（Cost-Aware Speedup Reward）；2) 基于分布的接近奖励（Distribution-Based Proximity Reward）；3) 自适应发散感知窗口化（Adaptive Divergence-Aware Windowing），优先选择高置信度加权发散的信息窗口进行训练。

Result: 在多个模型家族和基准测试上，平均接受长度达到6.29-6.52，加速比达到3.39-4.36倍，且使用统一的解码协议。

Conclusion: 性能驱动的窗口级优化是提升投机解码效率的实用方法，将优化从token级模仿转向窗口级优化能显著改善实际加速效果。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by having a lightweight draft model propose speculative windows of candidate tokens for parallel verification by a larger target model. In practice, speculative efficiency is often bottlenecked by hard-to-draft positions, where an early mismatch truncates the accepted prefix and invalidates the rest of the speculative window. Most learning-based drafters are still optimized with token-level supervised objectives, even though speculative utility is inherently window-level and prefix-sensitive. We propose PPOW (Performance-Driven Policy Optimization with Adaptive Windowing), a reinforcement learning framework that shifts drafter optimization from token-level imitation to window-level optimization. PPOW combines a Cost-Aware Speedup Reward, a Distribution-Based Proximity Reward, and Adaptive Divergence-Aware Windowing, which prioritizes informative windows with high confidence-weighted draft-target divergence. PPOW achieves average acceptance lengths of 6.29-6.52 and speedups of 3.39-4.36$\times$ across multiple model families and benchmarks under a unified decoding protocol. These results show that performance-driven window-level optimization is a practical approach to improving speculative decoding efficiency.

</details>


### [200] [Quantifying and Mitigating Premature Closure in Frontier LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15000)
*Rebecca Handler,Suhana Bedi,Nigam Shah*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLM）在医学任务中的“过早闭合”现象，即在缺乏足够信息时仍给出答案而非拒绝回答。实验表明，前沿LLM在MedQA和AfriMed-QA等基准测试中，即使正确答案被移除，仍然高频率选择答案（55-81%和53-82%）；在开放任务中，模型在30%-78%的问题上给出了不恰当回答。安全导向提示虽能减少但未能消除该问题，凸显了评估医学LLM“何时不应回答”的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 诊断错误的一个重要原因是过早闭合（premature closure），即尚未获取足够信息就过早下结论。该现象在人类医生中已被广泛研究，但在LLM中尚未得到系统考察。因此，作者希望定义并评估LLM在医学任务中的过早闭合行为。

Method: 作者定义LLM过早闭合为：在不确定情境下提供答案、推荐或临床指导，而更安全的做法应是澄清、弃权、升级或拒绝。采用两种评估方式：1）结构化任务：在MedQA（n=500）和AfriMed-QA（n=490）中移除正确选项，观察模型是否仍选择答案；2）开放任务：在HealthBench（861题）和医生撰写的对抗性查询（191题）上评估模型给出不恰当答案的比例。测试了五个前沿LLM，并尝试了安全导向提示。

Result: 基线条件下，模型在MedQA和AfriMed-QA上的虚假行动率分别为55-81%和53-82%；在开放任务中，HealthBench平均30%的问题和对抗性查询78%的问题上给出了不恰当答案。安全导向提示虽能降低过早闭合率，但无法完全消除问题。

Conclusion: 医学LLM存在严重的过早闭合问题，即使答案不可靠也倾向于给出回应。需要进一步研究如何让LLM学会“何时不应回答”，以提升其在医学场景中的安全性和可靠性。

Abstract: Premature closure, or committing to a conclusion before sufficient information is available, is a recognized contributor to diagnostic error but remains underexamined in large language models (LLMs). We define LLM premature closure as inappropriate commitment under uncertainty: providing an answer, recommendation, or clinical guidance when the safer response would be clarification, abstention, escalation, or refusal. We evaluated five frontier LLMs across structured and open-ended medical tasks. In MedQA (n = 500) and AfriMed-QA (n = 490) questions where the correct choice had been removed, models still selected an answer at high rates, with baseline false-action rates of 55-81% and 53-82%, respectively. In open-ended evaluation, models gave inappropriate answers on an average of 30% of 861 HealthBench questions and 78% of 191 physician-authored adversarial queries. Safety-oriented prompting reduced premature closure across models, but residual failure persisted, highlighting the need to evaluate whether medical LLMs know when not to answer.

</details>


### [201] [The Scientific Contribution Graph: Automated Literature-based Technological Roadmapping at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15011)
*Peter A. Jansen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了包含200万条科学贡献和1250万条前置关系的大规模AI/NLP领域科学贡献图谱，并提出科学前置预测任务，模型在时间过滤回测中达到0.48 MAP，旨在支持技术路线图规划和科学发现自动化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学贡献并非孤立发展，而是建立在前人发现之上。现有研究缺乏大规模、细粒度的科学贡献及其前置关系的结构化资源，难以支撑自动化技术路线图绘制和科学发现预测。

Method: 1) 从23万篇开放获取论文中提取科学贡献实体；2) 构建科学贡献图谱(SCG)，包含200万条贡献和1250万条前置关系边；3) 定义科学前置预测任务，使用时间过滤回测评估模型性能。

Result: 构建了AI/NLP领域大规模科学贡献图谱(230k论文, 200万贡献, 1250万前置边)；前置预测任务上最新模型达到0.48 MAP，且性能正在快速提升。

Conclusion: 该技术路线图资源可支持科学影响力评估和自动化科学发现，且现有的前置预测模型已展现出快速进步的趋势。

Abstract: Scientific contributions rarely develop in isolation, but instead build upon prior discoveries. We formulate the task of automated technological roadmapping as extracting scientific contributions from scholarly articles and linking them to their prerequisites. We present the Scientific Contribution Graph, a large-scale AI/NLP-domain resource containing 2 million detailed scientific contributions extracted from 230k open-access papers and connected by 12.5 million prerequisite edges. We further introduce scientific prerequisite prediction, a scientific discovery task in which models predict which existing technologies can enable future discoveries, and show that contemporary models are rapidly improving on this task, reaching 0.48 MAP when evaluated using temporally filtered backtesting. We anticipate technological roadmapping resources such as this will support scientific impact assessment and automated scientific discovery.

</details>


### [202] [COTCAgent: Preventive Consultation via Probabilistic Chain-of-Thought Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15016)
*Zihan Deng,Xiaozhen Zhong,Chuanzhi Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出COTCAgent，一种用于纵向电子健康记录推理的概率链式思维补全代理框架，通过解耦统计计算、特征匹配和语言生成，在自建数据集上达到90.47%的Top-1准确率，在HealthBench上达到70.41%，优于现有医疗代理和主流大语言模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在纵向EHR推理中存在两个关键缺陷：1）缺乏细粒度统计推理能力，在文本隐含定量证据时产生临床趋势和指标的幻觉；2）纵向EHR中的非均匀时间序列和稀缺标签阻碍模型捕捉长程时间依赖，限制了可靠的临床推理。

Method: 提出COTCAgent分层推理框架，包含三个核心模块：1）时间统计适配器（TSA）将分析计划转换为可执行代码以输出标准化趋势；2）链式思维补全层（COTC）利用症状-趋势-疾病知识库结合加权评分评估疾病风险；3）有界补全模块通过标准化询问和迭代评分约束获取结构化证据。框架解耦统计计算、特征匹配和语言生成。

Result: COTCAgent在自建数据集上达到90.47%的Top-1准确率，在HealthBench上达到70.41%，优于现有的医疗代理和主流大语言模型。

Conclusion: 通过解耦统计计算、特征匹配和语言生成，该框架消除了对复杂多模态输入的依赖，能够以较低的计算开销实现高效的纵向记录分析，为临床决策支持提供了可靠方案。

Abstract: As large language models empower healthcare, intelligent clinical decision support has developed rapidly. Longitudinal electronic health records (EHR) provide essential temporal evidence for accurate clinical diagnosis and analysis. However, current large language models have critical flaws in longitudinal EHR reasoning. First, lacking fine-grained statistical reasoning, they often hallucinate clinical trends and metrics when quantitative evidence is textually implied, biasing diagnostic inference. Second, non-uniform time series and scarce labels in longitudinal EHR hinder models from capturing long-range temporal dependencies, limiting reliable clinical reasoning. To address the above limitations, this work presents the Probabilistic Chain-of-Thought Completion Agent (COTCAgent), a hierarchical reasoning framework for longitudinal electronic health records. It consists of three core modules. The Temporal-Statistics Adapter (TSA) converts analytical plans into executable code for standardized trend output. The Chain-of-Thought Completion (COTC) layer leverages a symptom-trend-disease knowledge base with weighted scoring to evaluate disease risk, while the bounded completion module acquires structured evidence through standardized inquiries and iterative scoring constraints to ensure rigorous reasoning. By decoupling statistical computation, feature matching, and language generation, the framework eliminates reliance on complex multi-modal inputs and enables efficient longitudinal record analysis with lower computational overhead. Experimental results show that COTCAgent powered by Baichuan-M2 achieves 90.47% Top-1 accuracy on the self-built dataset and 70.41% on HealthBench, outperforming existing medical agents and mainstream large language models. The code is available at https://github.com/FrankDengAI/COTCAgent/.

</details>


### [203] [From Scenes to Elements: Multi-Granularity Evidence Retrieval for Verifiable Multimodal RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15019)
*Guanhua Chen,Chuyue Huang,Yutong Yao,Shudong Liu,Xueqing Song,Lidia S. Chao,Derek F. Wong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出GranuVistaVQA基准和GranuRAG框架，通过细粒度视觉元素检索提升多模态RAG系统性能，实现29.2%的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态RAG系统在粗粒度（整图/场景）检索，无法匹配细粒度用户查询，导致错误不可验证。

Method: GranuRAG三阶段框架：1) 元素级检测与分类；2) 多粒度跨模态对齐证据检索；3) 属性约束生成。

Result: 相比六个强基线方法，GranuRAG在细粒度检索任务上提升高达29.2%。

Conclusion: 将视觉元素视为一等检索单元，实现可透明错误诊断的细粒度多模态RAG。

Abstract: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems retrieve evidence at coarse granularities (entire images or scenes), creating a mismatch with fine-grained user queries and making failures unverifiable. We introduce GranuVistaVQA, a multimodal benchmark featuring real-world landmarks with element-level annotations across multiple viewpoints, capturing the partial observation challenge where individual images contain only subsets of entities. We further propose GranuRAG, a multi-granularity framework that treats visual elements as first-class retrieval units through three stages: element-level detection and classification, multi-granularity cross-modal alignment for evidence retrieval, and attribution-constrained generation. By grounding retrieval at the element level rather than relying on implicit attention, our approach enables transparent error diagnosis. Experiments demonstrate that GranuRAG achieves up to 29.2% improvement over six strong baselines for this task.

</details>


### [204] [Concurrency without Model Changes: Future-based Asynchronous Function Calling for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15077)
*Guangyu Feng,Huanzhi Mao,Prabal Dutta,Joseph E. Gonzalez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AsyncFC是一个纯执行层框架，将LLM解码与函数执行解耦，实现异步函数调用，在不影响准确率的前提下显著降低端到端延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM函数调用采用同步执行语义，解码过程被阻塞直到函数调用完成，导致端到端延迟增加。为了解决这一效率瓶颈，作者提出异步执行范式。

Method: 提出AsyncFC框架，在纯执行层将LLM解码与函数执行解耦。当依赖允许时，支持模型解码与函数执行的重叠以及函数间的并行执行。该框架可叠加于现有模型和未修改的函数实现之上，无需微调或改动标准的同步函数调用协议。

Result: 在标准函数调用基准和改编的软件工程基准上，AsyncFC在保持任务准确率的同时，显著减少了端到端任务完成时间。

Conclusion: LLM具备一种原生能力，可以对代表未解析执行结果的符号化未来进行推理，这使得模型-工具交互可以采用异步范式。

Abstract: Function calling, also known as tool use, is a core capability of modern LLM agents but is typically constrained by synchronous execution semantics. Under these semantics, LLM decoding is blocked until each function call completes, resulting in increasing end-to-end latency. In this work, we introduce AsyncFC, a pure execution-layer framework that decouples LLM decoding from function execution, enabling overlap between model decoding and function execution as well as inter-function parallelism when dependencies permit. AsyncFC layers over existing models and unmodified function implementations, requiring no fine-tuning or changes to the standard synchronous function-calling protocol. Across standard function-calling benchmarks and adapted software engineering benchmarks, AsyncFC significantly reduces end-to-end task completion time while preserving task accuracy. Furthermore, these results reveal that LLMs possess a native capability to reason over symbolic futures that represent unresolved execution results, enabling an asynchronous paradigm for model-tool interaction.

</details>


### [205] [ML-Embed: Inclusive and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15081)
*Ziyin Zhang,Zihan Liao,Hang Yu,Peng Di,Rui Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ML-Embed模型套件，通过3D-ML框架（结合MRL、MLL和MEL）解决文本嵌入领域的计算成本高、语言覆盖窄、透明度低三大障碍，在430个任务上评估，在17个MTEB基准中9个取得新纪录，尤其擅长低资源语言。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前高质量文本嵌入发展存在三大壁垒：计算成本过高、大多数语言被忽视（语言覆盖狭窄）、闭源或开放权重模型缺乏透明度阻碍研究，亟需打破这些障碍以实现全球公平和高效的人工智能系统。

Method: 提出3D-ML框架，包含三个维度：(1) MRL（存储效率），(2) MLL（推理深度灵活），(3) MEL（参数效率）。基于此框架构建ML-Embed模型套件（140M~8B参数），并构建大规模多语言数据集进行训练。

Result: 在430个任务上评估，17个MTEB基准中9个刷新纪录，低资源语言表现尤为突出，且所有模型、数据和代码均开源。

Conclusion: ML-Embed为构建全球公平且计算高效的AI系统提供了可复现的蓝图，证明了在多语言和资源受限场景下同时实现高性能和包容性的可行性。

Abstract: The development of high-quality text embeddings is increasingly drifting toward an exclusionary future, defined by three critical barriers: prohibitive computational costs, a narrow linguistic focus that neglects most of the world's languages, and a lack of transparency from closed-source or open-weight models that stifles research. To dismantle these barriers, we introduce ML-Embed, a suite of inclusive and efficient models built upon a new framework: 3-Dimensional Matryoshka Learning (3D-ML). Our framework addresses the computational challenge with comprehensive efficiency across the entire model lifecycle. Beyond the storage benefits of Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) and flexible inference-time depth provided by Matryoshka Layer Learning (MLL), we introduce Matryoshka Embedding Learning (MEL) for enhanced parameter efficiency. To address the linguistic challenge, we curate a massively multilingual dataset and train a suite of models ranging from 140M to 8B parameters. In a direct commitment to transparency, we release all models, data, and code. Extensive evaluation on 430 tasks demonstrates that our models set new records on 9 of 17 evaluated MTEB benchmarks, with particularly strong results in low-resource languages, providing a reproducible blueprint for building globally equitable and computationally efficient AI systems.

</details>


### [206] [Improving Multi-turn Dialogue Consistency with Self-Recall Thinking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15102)
*Renning Pang,Tian Lan,Leyuan Liu,Xiaoming Huang,Piao Tong,Xiaosong Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Self-Recall Thinking (SRT)框架，通过识别有用历史轮次并选择性召回推理，解决多轮对话中的长距离依赖和稀疏信息问题，在提升F1分数4.7%的同时降低端到端延迟14.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的多轮对话系统在长对话中难以追踪非相邻轮次间的依赖关系，处理完整对话历史导致效率瓶颈，而现有外部记忆方案延迟高、迭代摘要方案丢失细节。

Method: SRT框架包含三个组件：(1)依赖构建(Dependency Construction)：生成并转换为自召回链；(2)能力初始化(Capability Initialization)：训练模型获得带有召回token的推理链能力；(3)推理改进(Reasoning Improvement)：通过可验证奖励优化召回和推理的准确性。

Result: 在多个数据集上，SRT相比先前方法F1分数提升4.7%，端到端延迟降低14.7%，在推理延迟和准确性之间取得了平衡，优于现有最先进基线。

Conclusion: SRT通过内生推理过程实现可解释的召回步骤，无需外部模块，有效解决了长对话中的上下文依赖和稀疏信息问题，在准确性和效率上均优于现有方法。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) based multi-turn dialogue systems often struggle to track dependencies across non-adjacent turns, undermining both consistency and scalability. As conversations lengthen, essential information becomes sparse and is buried in irrelevant context, while processing the entire dialogue history incurs severe efficiency bottlenecks. Existing solutions either rely on high latency external memory or lose fine-grained details through iterative summarization. In this paper, we propose Self-Recall Thinking (SRT), a framework designed to address long-range contextual dependency and sparse informative signals in multi-turn dialogue. SRT identifies helpful historical turns and uses them to generate contextually appropriate responses, enabling the model to selectively recall and reason over context during inference. This process yields an endogenous reasoning process that integrates interpretable recall steps without external modules. SRT incorporates: (1) Dependency Construction: Generating and converting it into self-recall chains; (2)Capability Initialization: Training to enable reasoning chains with recall tokens capability; (3)Reasoning Improvement: Refining accuracy via verifiable rewards to optimize recall and reasoning for correct answers. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that SRT improves F1 score by 4.7% and reduces end-to-end latency by 14.7% over prior methods, achieving a balance between reasoning latency and accuracy, and outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [207] [From Text to Voice: A Reproducible and Verifiable Framework for Evaluating Tool Calling LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15104)
*Md Tahmid Rahman Laskar,Xue-Yong Fu,Seyyed Saeed Sarfjoo,Quinten McNamara,Jonas Robertson,Shashi Bhushan TN*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个数据无关的框架，将已有的文本工具调用基准转换为可控的音频评测，通过TTS、说话人变化和环境噪声生成文本-音频配对数据。在Confetti和When2Call数据集上评估7个全模态模型，发现性能高度依赖模型和任务，文本到语音的差距为1.8-4.8分，主要失败原因是参数值理解错误。还验证了开源Qwen3（8B+）裁判与专有裁判一致性超80%，支持隐私保护评测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音智能体需要可靠的工具调用能力，但现有主流工具调用基准都是文本形式的。作者希望在不重新标注工具模式和标签的前提下，将已验证的文本基准可控地转换为音频评测，填补语音工具调用评测的空白。

Method: 提出一个数据集无关的框架，通过TTS合成语音、引入说话人变化和环境噪声，保留原数据集标注。在Confetti和When2Call基准上构建音频版本，评估7个全模态模型，并设计消歧重构压力测试和LLM-as-judge协议（验证开源裁判与人类偏好的一致性）。

Result: Gemini-3.1-Flash-Live在Confetti上最高（70.4），GPT-Realtime-1.5在When2Call上最高（71.9）。文本-语音差距：Qwen3-Omni最小（1.8分），GPT-Realtime-1.5最大（4.8分）。Qwen3-8B以上裁判与专有裁判一致性超80%。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了可验证、可复现的一阶段诊断方法，可补充专门构建的音频语料库。语音工具调用性能高度依赖模型和任务，主要瓶颈是参数值的语音理解。

Abstract: Voice agents increasingly require reliable tool use from speech, whereas prominent tool-calling benchmarks remain text-based. We study whether verified text benchmarks can be converted into controlled audio-based tool calling evaluations without re-annotating the tool schema and gold labels. Our dataset-agnostic framework uses text-to-speech, speaker variation, and environmental noise to create paired text-audio instances while preserving the original dataset annotations. Based on extensive evaluation of 7 omni-modal models on audio-converted versions of Confetti and When2Call, our framework demonstrates that the performance is strongly model- and task-dependent: Gemini-3.1-Flash-Live obtains the highest Confetti score (70.4), whereas GPT-Realtime-1.5 performs best on When2Call (71.9). On Confetti, the text-to-voice gap ranges from 1.8 points for Qwen3-Omni to 4.8 points for GPT-Realtime-1.5. A targeted analysis of failure cases demonstrates that degradations most often reflect misunderstandings of argument values in the speech. Considering real-world deployment scenarios, we further report text-only results, an ambiguity-based reformulation stress test, and a reference-free LLM-as-judge protocol validated against human preferences. Notably, we find that open-source Qwen3 judges with at least 8B parameters exceed 80% agreement with proprietary judges, supporting privacy-preserving evaluation. Overall, our framework provides a verifiable and reproducible first-stage diagnostic that complements purpose-built audio corpora.

</details>


### [208] [MeMo: Memory as a Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15156)
*Ryan Wei Heng Quek,Sanghyuk Lee,Alfred Wei Lun Leong,Arun Verma,Alok Prakash,Nancy F. Chen,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low,Daniela Rus,Armando Solar-Lezama*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MeMo是一个模块化框架，将新知识编码到专用记忆模型中，保持LLM参数不变，在不修改原始模型的情况下高效注入领域知识，在三个基准上取得优秀表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在预训练后参数冻结，难以高效注入及时的领域特定知识，现有方法存在文档关系建模不足、对检索噪声敏感、灾难性遗忘等问题。

Method: 提出MeMo框架，通过一个独立的记忆模型编码新知识，不改变LLM参数，支持跨文档关系建模、对检索噪声鲁棒、避免灾难性遗忘，且无需访问LLM权重或logits。

Result: 在BrowseComp-Plus、NarrativeQA和MuSiQue三个基准上，MeMo相比现有方法在多种场景下均取得更优性能。

Conclusion: MeMo作为一种即插即用的模块化记忆框架，能够高效、鲁棒地为LLM注入新知识，适用于开源和闭源模型，且推理时检索成本与语料库规模无关。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a wide range of tasks, but remain frozen after pretraining until subsequent updates. Many real-world applications require timely, domain-specific information, motivating the need for efficient mechanisms to incorporate new knowledge. In this paper, we introduce MeMo (Memory as a Model), a modular framework that encodes new knowledge into a dedicated memory model while keeping the LLM parameters unchanged. Compared to existing methods, MeMo offers several advantages: (a) it captures complex cross-document relationships, (b) it is robust to retrieval noise, (c) it avoids catastrophic forgetting in the LLM, (d) it does not require access to the LLM's weights or output logits, enabling plug-and-play integration with both open and proprietary closed-source LLMs, and (e) its retrieval cost is independent of corpus size at inference time. Our experimental results on three benchmarks, BrowseComp-Plus, NarrativeQA, and MuSiQue, show that MeMo achieves strong performance compared to existing methods across diverse settings.

</details>


### [209] [Text Knows What, Tables Know When: Clinical Timeline Reconstruction via Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15168)
*Sayantan Kumar,Shahriar Noroozizadeh,Juyong Kim,Jeremy C. Weiss*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种检索增强的多模态对齐框架，通过将非结构化临床文本与结构化EHR数据相结合，利用基于图的锚点提取和时序校准方法，显著提升了临床时间线的绝对时间戳精度和时序一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非结构化临床叙述虽语义丰富但缺乏时间精度，而结构化EHR数据时间精确但遗漏大量临床事件，两者存在互补性缺口，需要一种融合方法以提高临床时间线重建的时态保真度。

Method: 方法将时间线重建建模为基于图的多步骤过程：1）从叙述中提取中心锚定事件构建初始时间骨架；2）将非中心事件相对于该骨架进行定位；3）利用检索到的结构化EHR行作为外部时间证据对时间线进行校准。

Result: 在i2m4基准（MIMIC-III/IV）上，该多模态流水线在几乎所有评估模型中一致提升了绝对时间戳精度（AULTC）和时间一致性，且未牺牲事件匹配率。此外，34.8%的文本衍生事件在表格记录中完全缺失。

Conclusion: 对齐非结构化文本与结构化EHR数据可以生成比任一单一数据源更时态忠实、更具临床信息量的患者轨迹重建。

Abstract: Reconstructing precise clinical timelines is essential for modeling patient trajectories and forecasting risk in complex, heterogeneous conditions like sepsis. While unstructured clinical narratives offer semantically rich and contextually complete descriptions of a patient's course, they often lack temporal precision and contain ambiguous event timing. Conversely, structured electronic health record (EHR) data provides precise temporal anchors but misses a substantial portion of clinically meaningful events. We introduce a retrieval-augmented multimodal alignment framework that bridges this gap to improve the temporal precision of absolute clinical timelines extracted from text. Our approach formulates timeline reconstruction as a graph-based multistep process: it first extracts central anchor events from narratives to build an initial temporal scaffold, places non-central events relative to this backbone, and then calibrates the timeline using retrieved structured EHR rows as external temporal evidence. Evaluated using instruction-tuned large language models on the i2m4 benchmark spanning MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV, our multimodal pipeline consistently improves absolute timestamp accuracy (AULTC) and improves temporal concordance across nearly all evaluated models over unimodal text-only reconstruction, without compromising event match rates. Furthermore, our empirical gap analysis reveals that 34.8% of text-derived events are entirely absent from tabular records, demonstrating that aligning these modalities can produce a more temporally faithful and clinically informative reconstruction of patient trajectories than either source alone.

</details>


### [210] [Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15184)
*Sahil Sen,Akhil Kasturi,Elias Lumer,Anmol Gulati,Vamse Kumar Subbiah*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了LLM智能体系统中不同检索策略（grep vs 向量检索）与智能体架构及工具调用范式的交互效果。通过两个实验发现：grep通常优于向量检索，但整体性能高度依赖于具体的智能体框架和工具调用方式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献缺乏对检索策略选择如何与智能体架构、工具调用范式相互作用的系统性比较，尤其是在工具输出呈现方式以及检索需处理无关文本时的性能变化等实践维度尚未被充分探索。

Method: 实验1：在LongMemEval的116个问题上，比较grep和向量检索在Chronos、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI四种框架下的表现，涵盖内联工具结果和文件式工具结果。实验2：逐步混入无关对话历史，比较纯grep和纯向量检索在干扰增多情况下的性能。

Result: 在Chronos及各提供者CLI中，grep的准确率普遍高于向量检索。然而，整体得分强烈依赖于具体框架和工具调用风格，即便底层对话数据相同。

Conclusion: 检索策略的选择很重要（grep优于向量检索），但框架和工具调用范式的影响同样显著，二者不可偏废。

Abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Model (LLM) agents have enabled complex agentic workflows where models autonomously retrieve information, call tools, and reason over large corpora to complete tasks on behalf of users. Despite the growing adoption of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in agentic search systems, existing literature lacks a systematic comparison of how retrieval strategy choice interacts with agent architecture and tool-calling paradigm. Important practical dimensions, including how tool outputs are presented to the model and how performance changes when searches must cope with more irrelevant surrounding text, remain under-explored in agent loops. This paper reports an empirical study organized into two experiments. Experiment 1 compares grep and vector retrieval on a 116-question sample from LongMemEval, using a custom agent harness (Chronos) and provider-native CLI harnesses (Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI), for both inline tool results and file-based tool results that the model reads separately. Experiment 2 compares grep-only and vector-only retrieval while progressively mixing in additional unrelated conversation history, so that each query is embedded in more distracting material alongside the passages that matter. Across Chronos and the provider CLIs, grep generally yields higher accuracy than vector retrieval in our comparisons in experiment 1; at the same time, overall scores still depend strongly on which harness and tool-calling style is used, even when the underlying conversation data are the same.

</details>


### [211] [Hidden State Poisoning Attacks against Mamba-based Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.01972)
*Alexandre Le Mercier,Chris Develder,Thomas Demeester*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现状态空间模型（如Mamba）容易受到一种名为HiSPA的隐藏状态投毒攻击，该攻击通过特定短输入短语不可逆地覆盖隐藏状态信息，导致模型产生部分遗忘效应。实验表明即使混合模型Jamba-1.7-Mini也会在这种攻击下崩溃，而纯Transformer则不受影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 状态空间模型（SSM）如Mamba虽然计算效率高，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未被充分研究。作者希望填补这一空白，探究SSM在对抗攻击下的脆弱性。

Method: 提出Hidden State Poisoning Attack (HiSPA)攻击方法，通过特定短输入短语不可逆地覆写模型隐藏状态信息；构建RoBench-25基准评估模型在HiSPA攻击下的信息检索能力；对Mamba、Mamba-2、Jamba-1.7-Mini、Nemotron-3-Nano等模型进行测试，并与纯Transformer对比；进行可解释性研究分析攻击时Mamba隐藏层的模式。

Result: HiSPA攻击能有效破坏SSM模型的信息检索能力；即使是Jamba-1.7-Mini这种52B的SSM-Transformer混合模型也在HiSPA攻击下崩溃；纯Transformer不受影响；HiSPA触发词会显著削弱Jamba模型在Open-Prompt-Injections基准上的表现；Mamba-2同样存在此问题。

Conclusion: SSM及其混合模型存在对抗鲁棒性隐患，HiSPA攻击揭示了其隐藏状态更新的安全缺陷。可解释性研究发现的隐藏层模式可用于构建HiSPA防御系统。

Abstract: State space models (SSMs) like Mamba offer efficient alternatives to Transformer-based language models, with linear time complexity. Yet, their adversarial robustness remains critically unexplored. This paper studies the phenomenon whereby specific short input phrases induce a partial amnesia effect in such models, by irreversibly overwriting information in their hidden states, referred to as a Hidden State Poisoning Attack (HiSPA). Our benchmark RoBench-25 allows evaluating a model's information retrieval capabilities when subject to HiSPAs, and confirms the vulnerability of SSMs against such attacks. Even the recent Jamba-1.7-Mini SSM--Transformer (a 52B hybrid model) collapses on RoBench-25 under some HiSPA triggers, whereas pure Transformers do not. We also observe that HiSPA triggers significantly weaken the Jamba model on the popular Open-Prompt-Injections benchmark, unlike pure Transformers. We further show that the theoretical and empirical findings extend to Mamba-2, and also analyse a Mamba-2-based hybrid (Nemotron-3-Nano). Finally, our interpretability study reveals patterns in Mamba's hidden layers during HiSPAs that could be used to build a HiSPA mitigation system. The full code and data to reproduce the experiments can be found at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/hispa_anonymous-5DB0.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [212] [Vision-Based Runtime Monitoring under Varying Specifications using Semantic Latent Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13923)
*Bardh Hoxha,Oliver Schön,Hideki Okamoto,Lars Lindemann,Georgios Fainekos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在部分可观测条件下，基于视觉观测对过去时间信号时序逻辑(ptSTL)进行认证运行时监控。提出一种可重用的监控框架，通过语义基向量和滚动预测监控器实现无需逐公式重新训练的认证监控，并在真实驾驶数据上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有监控方法通常需要针对每个公式单独训练和校准，缺乏可重用性，且难以在部分可观测的视觉场景下提供有限样本保证。

Method: 1) 证明语义基向量（原子鲁棒性得分向量）是单调、1-Lipschitz可重用接口的最小预测目标；2) 提出滚动预测监控器，仅预测当前谓词值并在线重建时序历史；3) 通过单次保形校准认证整个片段，无需联合界。

Result: 在行人交叉路口基准上，滚动监控器在短时域上认证界更紧，语义基监控器在长时域上紧4倍；在Waymo真实驾驶数据上两者均满足保形覆盖保证。

Conclusion: 提出的可重用监控框架在部分可观测视觉场景下实现了有效的时序逻辑认证监控，兼顾了理论保证与实践效果。

Abstract: We study certified runtime monitoring of past-time signal temporal logic (ptSTL) from visual observations under partial observability. The monitor must infer safety-relevant quantities from images and provide finite-sample guarantees, while being \emph{reusable}: once trained and calibrated, it should certify any formula in a target fragment without per-formula retraining. For fragments induced by a finite dictionary of temporal atoms, we prove that the \emph{semantic basis}, the vector of atom robustness scores, is the minimum prediction target within the class of monotone, 1-Lipschitz reusable interfaces: any formula is evaluated by a deterministic decoder derived from the parse tree, and a single conformal calibration pass certifies the entire fragment with no union bound. We also introduce a \emph{rolling prediction monitor} that predicts only current predicate values and reconstructs temporal history online; this is easier to learn but grows conservative at long horizons. On a pedestrian-crossroad benchmark, rolling achieves tighter certified bounds at short horizons while the semantic-basis monitor is up to 4-times tighter at long horizons. We validate the presented monitors on real-world Waymo driving data, where both monitors satisfy the conformal coverage guarantee empirically.

</details>


### [213] [Mechanistic Interpretability of EEG Foundation Models via Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13930)
*William Lehn-Schiøler,Magnus Ruud Kjær,Rahul Thapa,Magnus Guldberg Pedersen,Anton Storgaard Mosquera,Nick Williams,Radu Gatej,Tue Lehn-Schiøler,Sándor Beniczky,Sadasivan Puthusserypady,James Zou,Lars Kai Hansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过TopK稀疏自编码器提取三种EEG Transformer模型的特征字典，并基于临床分类法评估特征的单义性与纠缠度，揭示了临床概念选择性操控的三种机制，以及"破坏性干预"和"临床纠缠"等关键表征失败，最后通过频谱解码器将潜在操作映射为可解释的生理频率特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG基础模型在临床上性能优异，但其内部计算机制不透明，阻碍了临床信任的建立。作者旨在通过可解释性方法揭示这些模型的黑箱操作。

Method: 对三种架构不同的EEG transformer（SleepFM、REVE、LaBraM）应用TopK稀疏自编码器提取稀疏特征字典；基于临床分类法（异常、年龄、性别、用药）基准测试单义性和纠缠度；提出单一超参数流程和"目标vs离靶"探针区域指标量化操控选择性；使用频谱解码器将干预映射到幅度谱。

Result: 发现了三种操作机制（选择性可操控、编码但纠缠、未编码）；识别出"破坏性干预"导致全局性能崩溃，以及"年龄-病理混淆"等临床纠缠问题；成功将潜在操控映射为病理慢波抑制和α波恢复等生理可解释的频率特征。

Conclusion: 该框架系统揭示了EEG基础模型的可解释性问题，为临床信任的建立提供了方法论基础，并展示了将模型内部操纵与生理学可解释信号关联起来的可行性。

Abstract: EEG foundation models achieve state-of-the-art clinical performance, yet the internal computations driving their predictions remain opaque: a barrier to clinical trust. We apply TopK Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) across three architecturally distinct EEG transformers: SleepFM, REVE, and LaBraM to extract sparse feature dictionaries from their embeddings. By grounding these features in a clinical taxonomy (abnormality, age, sex, and medication), we benchmark monosemanticity and entanglement across architectures. A single hyperparameter procedure, driven by an intrinsic dictionary health audit, transfers robustly across all three architectures. Via concept steering, we introduce a "target vs. off-target" probe area metric to quantify steering selectivity and reveal three operational regimes: selectively steerable, encoded but entangled, and non-encoded. This framework exposes critical representational failures: "wrecking-ball" interventions that collapse global model performance, and clinical entanglements, such as age-pathology confounding, where it is impossible to suppress one concept without corrupting the other. Finally, a spectral decoder maps these interventions back to the amplitude spectrum, translating latent manipulations into physiologically interpretable frequency signatures, such as pathological slow-wave suppression and $α$-band restoration.

</details>


### [214] [Rethinking Molecular OOD Generalization via Target-Aware Source Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13932)
*Zhuohao Lin,Kun Li,Jiameng Chen,Jiajun Yu,Duanhua Cao,Yizhen Zheng,Wenbin Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对分子性质预测中的极端分布外（OOD）问题，本文提出SCOPE-BENCH基准（基于理化描述符空间的簇级划分）和POMA框架（检索-组合-自适应的多源知识迁移），实验表明现有3D模型误差平均扩大5.9倍，而POMA平均降低6.2%的绝对误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有scaffold-splitting无法阻断微观语义重叠，导致模型捷径学习并高估外推能力；传统域适应在极端结构偏移下会注入拓扑噪声并引发负迁移。

Method: 提出SCOPE-BENCH基准（显式理化描述符空间的簇级划分）和POMA框架：①检索与目标结构相近的标记源骨架作为代理目标；②强化学习策略从指数级候选池中自适应选择最优源子集；③在宏观拓扑和微观药效团尺度进行双尺度域适应。

Result: SOTA 3D分子模型在SCOPE-BENCH上预测误差最高扩大8.0倍（均值5.9倍）；POMA在多种骨干架构上最高降低11.2%的MAE，平均相对提升6.2%。

Conclusion: 现有OOD评估协议存在严重低估，POMA通过选择性多源迁移有效缓解了极端结构偏移下的负迁移问题。

Abstract: Robust prediction of molecular properties under extreme out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios is a pivotal bottleneck in AI-driven drug discovery. Current scaffold-splitting protocols fail to obstruct microscopic semantic overlap, predisposing models to shortcut learning and overestimating their true extrapolation capability; meanwhile, conventional domain adaptation paradigms suffer under extreme structural shifts, as blindly aligning heterogeneous source libraries injects topological noise and triggers negative transfer. To address these two challenges, scaffold-cluster out-of-distribution performance evaluation benchmark (SCOPE-BENCH), a benchmark built on cluster-level partitioning in an explicit physicochemical descriptor space, is proposed alongside policy optimization for multi-source adaptation (POMA), a framework that formulates knowledge transfer as a retrieve-compose-adapt pipeline: labeled source scaffolds structurally close to the unlabeled target are first identified as proxy targets; a reinforcement learning policy then adaptively selects the optimal source subset from an exponentially large candidate pool; and dual-scale domain adaptation is finally performed at macroscopic topological and microscopic pharmacophore scales. Evaluations show that prediction errors of state-of-the-art 3D molecular models surge by up to 8.0x on SCOPE-BENCH with a mean of 5.9x, while POMA achieves up to an 11.2% reduction in mean absolute error with an average relative improvement of 6.2% across diverse backbone architectures. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Molecular-OOD-Code-73F6.

</details>


### [215] [Unsupervised learning of acquisition variability in structural connectomes via hybrid latent space modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13933)
*Gaurav Rudravaram,Lianrui Zuo,Karthik Ramadass,Elyssa McMaster,Jongyeon Yoon,Aravind R. Krishnan,Adam M. Saunders,Chenyu Gao,Nancy R. Newlin,Praitayini Kanakaraj,Lori L. Beason Held,Murat Bilgel,Laura A. Barquero,Micah DArchangel,Tin Q. Nguyen,Laurie B. Cutting,Derek Archer,Timothy J. Hohman,Daniel C. Moyer,Bennett A. Landman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种无监督的联合变分自编码器（Joint-VAE），通过架构退火（architectural annealing）技术自动平衡离散与连续潜在变量，无需手动调参即可分离dMRI数据中的采集效应与生物变异。在7,416个结构连接组数据集上，该方法在采集参数聚类方面优于基线模型（ARI=0.53）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同站点、扫描仪和采集协议引入的dMRI数据差异会干扰结构连接组分析。现有方法要么将所有变异建模为连续的（难以分离采集效应），要么需要手动调参来平衡离散/连续成分，缺乏自动化方案。

Method: 提出Joint-VAE框架，在解码前对编码器输出进行**架构退火**（而非仅损失函数退火），使模型在训练过程中自适应地平衡离散和连续潜在变量，无需手动容量调参。数据集包含N=7,416个结构连接组（年龄2-102岁，13个研究，25种采集参数组合）。

Result: 架构退火的Joint-VAE在站点学习上达到ARI=0.53（p<0.05），优于标准VAE、PCA+k-means聚类以及仅通过损失函数退火的混合模型。恢复的聚类与扫描器和协议差异高度对齐。

Conclusion: 混合连续-离散潜在空间（结合架构退火而非损失退火）提供了一种有效的无监督机制来捕捉dMRI中的采集变异性，通过联合建模平滑结构和类别结构实现。

Abstract: Acquisition differences across sites, scanners, and protocols in dMRI introduce variability that complicates structural connectome analysis. This motivates deep learning models that can represent high-dimensional connectomes in a low-dimensional space while explicitly separating acquisition-related effects from biological variation. Conventional dimensionality reduction methods model all variance as continuous, so acquisition effects often get absorbed into a continuous latent space. Recent hybrid latent-space models combine discrete and continuous components to address this, but typically require manual capacity tuning to ensure the discrete component captures the intended variability. We introduce an unsupervised framework that removes this manual tuning by architecturally annealing encoder outputs before decoding, allowing the model to adaptively balance discrete and continuous latent variables during training. To evaluate it, we curated a dataset of N=7,416 structural connectomes derived from dMRI, spanning ages 2 to 102 and 13 studies with 25 unique acquisition-parameter combinations. Of these, 5,900 are cognitively unimpaired, 877 have mild cognitive impairment (MCI), and 639 have Alzheimer's disease (AD). We compare against a standard VAE, PCA with k-means clustering, and hybrid models that anneal only through the loss function. Our architectural annealing produces stronger site learning (ARI=0.53, p<0.05) than these baselines. Results show that a hybrid continuous-discrete latent space, with architectural rather than loss-based annealing, provides a useful unsupervised mechanism for capturing acquisition variability in dMRI: by jointly modeling smooth and categorical structure, the Joint-VAE recovers clusters aligned with scanner and protocol differences.

</details>


### [216] [Beyond Mode-Seeking RL: Trajectory-Balance Post-Training for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13935)
*Saba Ahmadi,Prasanna Parthasarathi,Yufei Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TraFL方法，通过轨迹平衡目标解决扩散语言模型在强化学习后训练中因奖励驱动更新导致概率过度集中（轨迹锁定）的问题，在数学推理和代码生成任务上显著优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散语言模型的后训练方法多采用奖励最大化目标，但会导致"轨迹锁定"问题：奖励驱动的采样更新将概率过度集中到少数去噪路径上，多次采样时缺乏对替代正确解的覆盖。

Method: 提出TraFL（Trajectory Flow baLancing），采用轨迹平衡目标，将策略训练导向以冻结参考模型为锚点的奖励偏斜目标分布。具体包括：扩散兼容的序列级替代目标函数和学习的提示相关归一化项。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，TraFL是唯一在所有基准长度设置下均优于基线的后训练方法，且增益随采样预算增加而持续。在Minerva Math和LiveCodeBench上均展现出最强的迁移性能。

Conclusion: TraFL有效克服了轨迹锁定问题，为扩散语言模型提供了一种鲁棒且可扩展的后训练范式，在多样化的推理任务上表现出持续的优势。

Abstract: Diffusion language models are a promising alternative to autoregressive models, yet post-training methods for them largely adapt reward-maximizing objectives. We identify a central failure mode in this setting we call trajectory locking: sampled reward-driven updates over-concentrate probability mass onto a narrow set of denoising paths, reducing coverage of alternative correct solutions under repeated sampling. To address this, we propose TraFL (Trajectory Flow baLancing), a trajectory-balance objective that trains the policy toward a reward-tilted target distribution anchored to a frozen reference model. We make this practical for diffusion language models with a diffusion-compatible sequence-level surrogate and a learned prompt-dependent normalization. Across mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks, TraFL is the only evaluated post-training method that improves over the base model in every benchmark-length setting, with gains that persist as the sampling budget increases. The improvements transfer to held-out evaluations: TraFL stays above the base model on Minerva Math and is the strongest method on every LiveCodeBench difficulty split.

</details>


### [217] [Towards the Next Frontier of LLMs, Training on Private Data: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for Federated Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13936)
*Daniel M. Jimenez-Gutierrez,Enrique Zuazua,Georgios Kellaris,Joaquin del Rio,Oleksii Sliusarenko,Xabi Uribe-Etxebarria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于联邦学习的框架（建立在Sherpa.ai平台上），使多个机构能够在不共享私有数据的情况下联合微调大语言模型。在医疗和金融领域的四个问答/分类数据集上，采用LoRA、QLoRA和IA3三种参数高效微调策略进行评测。结果表明，联邦微调性能接近集中式训练，优于单机构独立学习；其中QLoRA和IA3在保证精度的同时提升了绿色AI效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的发展受限于公共数据，而最有价值的信息（如医疗、金融领域的私有数据）因隐私、法规和组织壁垒而分散在各个机构中，无法被直接利用。这些数据通常是非独立同分布（non-IID）的，进一步增加了挑战。因此，需要一种既能利用这些分布式私有数据，又不违反隐私要求的方法。

Method: 基于Sherpa.ai联邦学习平台构建框架，多个节点在不交换私有数据的前提下联合微调共享LLM。采用LoRA、QLoRA和IA3三种参数高效微调（PEFT）策略，在非独立同分布（non-IID）设置下，对四种数据集（MedQA、MedMCQA、FPB、FiQA-SA）进行交叉领域基准评估。

Result: 联邦微调的性能接近集中式训练，显著优于单机构独立学习。从绿色AI角度看，QLoRA和IA3在精度损失可控的情况下显著提升了训练效率。

Conclusion: 联邦参数高效微调（Federated PEFT）是一种可行且高效的方法，能够在不共享私有数据的前提下，利用分布式机构数据适配LLM，兼顾隐私保护、域适应性和计算效率。

Abstract: The recent success of large language models (LLMs) has been largely driven by vast public datasets. However, the next frontier for LLM development lies beyond public data. Much of the world's most valuable information is private, especially in highly regulated sectors such as healthcare and finance, where data include patient histories or customer communications. Unlocking this data could represent a major leap forward, enabling LLMs with deeper domain expertise and stronger real-world utility. Yet, these data cannot be shared because they are distributed across institutions and constrained by privacy, regulatory, and organizational barriers. Moreover, institutional datasets are typically non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID), differing across sites in population characteristics, data modalities, documentation patterns, and task-specific label distributions.
  In this paper, we demonstrate a practical approach to unlocking private and distributed institutional data for LLM adaptation through federated collaboration across data silos. Built on the Sherpa.ai Federated Learning platform, our framework enables nodes to jointly fine-tune a shared LLM without exchanging private data. We evaluate this approach through a cross-domain benchmark in healthcare and finance, using four closed-ended question answering and classification datasets: MedQA, MedMCQA, FPB, and FiQA-SA. We compare three parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) strategies-LoRA, QLoRA, and IA3-across pretrained backbones under non-IID settings reflecting institutional data heterogeneity. Our results show that federated fine-tuning performs close to centralized training and outperforms isolated single-institution learning. From a Green AI perspective, QLoRA and IA3 improve efficiency with limited accuracy degradation, supporting federated PEFT as a viable approach for adapting LLMs where data cannot be shared.

</details>


### [218] [EvolveMem:Self-Evolving Memory Architecture via AutoResearch for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13941)
*Jiaqi Liu,Xinyu Ye,Peng Xia,Zeyu Zheng,Cihang Xie,Mingyu Ding,Huaxiu Yao*

Main category: cs.LG
