*Sergio Vanegas,Lasse Lensu,Fredy Ruiz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Schur分解的投影方法，用于保证线性离散时间状态空间层的渐近稳定性，同时支持反向传播。该方法将状态矩阵的实Schur分解的拟三角因子投影到最近的稳定矩阵，以最小过参数化确保稳定动态。实验表明，该方法在合成和真实数据集上均能达到与最先进技术相当的精度和收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从数据构建动态系统的黑箱模型时，保证渐近稳定性是一个关键挑战，现有方法难以在确保稳定性的同时保持计算效率和精度。

Method: 提出基于Schur分解的投影方案：利用状态矩阵的实Schur分解，将拟三角因子动态投影到最近的稳定矩阵；同时提供预因子化形式的替代方法。该方法支持反向传播，且过参数化程度最低。

Result: 在合成线性系统上，该方法在精度和收敛速度上与最先进的稳定系统识别技术相当，仅计算复杂度略有增加。在含静态非线性的堆叠神经网络架构中，较低权重数有助于收敛且不牺牲精度。

Conclusion: 基于Schur的投影方法为识别复杂动态系统提供了一个数值稳健的框架，能够在满足严格渐近稳定性要求的同时达到与最先进技术相当的性能。

Abstract: Building black-box models for dynamical systems from data is a challenging problem in machine learning, especially when asymptotic stability guarantees are required. In this paper, we introduce a novel stability-ensuring and backpropagation-compatible projection scheme based on the Schur decomposition for the state matrix of linear discrete-time state-space layers, as well as an alternative pre-factorized formulation of the methodology. The proposed methods dynamically project the quasi-triangular factor of the state matrix's real Schur decomposition onto its nearest stable peer, ensuring stable dynamics with minimal overparameterization. Experiments on synthetic linear systems demonstrate that the method achieves accuracy and convergence rates comparable to those of state-of-the-art stable-system identification techniques, despite a marginal increase in computational complexity. Furthermore, the lower weight count facilitates convergence during training without sacrificing accuracy in stacked neural-network architectures with static nonlinearities targeting real-world datasets. These results suggest that the Schur-based projection provides a numerically robust framework for identifying complex dynamics on par with the State of the Art while satisfying strict asymptotic-stability requirements.

</details>


### [293] [ROAD: Adaptive Data Mixing for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning via Bi-Level Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14497)
*Letian Yang,Xu Liu,Yiqiang Lu,Jian Liu,Weiqiang Wang,Shuai Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ROAD框架，通过双层优化和多臂老虎机机制自适应地选择离线数据回放策略，解决了离线到在线强化学习中的数据分布偏移和目标不一致问题，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线到在线RL方法使用静态混合比例或启发式回放策略，缺乏对不同环境和训练动态的自适应能力，导致稳定性与渐近性能之间的权衡不佳。

Method: 将数据选择问题建模为双层优化（外层：数据混合策略决定策略性能；内层：传统Q学习更新），并提出基于多臂老虎机的实用算法，通过近似双层梯度的代理目标来指导数据选择。

Result: 在多个数据集上，ROAD持续优于现有数据回放方法，无需手动调整即可实现更好的稳定性和渐近性能。

Conclusion: ROAD作为即插即用的动态框架，有效解决了离线到在线RL中的数据混合自适应问题，消除了对特定场景手动调参的需求。

Abstract: Offline-to-online reinforcement learning harnesses the stability of offline pretraining and the flexibility of online fine-tuning. A key challenge lies in the non-stationary distribution shift between offline datasets and the evolving online policy. Common approaches often rely on static mixing ratios or heuristic-based replay strategies, which lack adaptability to different environments and varying training dynamics, resulting in suboptimal tradeoff between stability and asymptotic performance. In this work, we propose Reinforcement Learning with Optimized Adaptive Data-mixing (ROAD), a dynamic plug-and-play framework that automates the data replay process. We identify a fundamental objective misalignment in existing approaches. To tackle this, we formulate the data selection problem as a bi-level optimization process, interpreting the data mixing strategy as a meta-decision governing the policy performance (outer-level) during online fine-tuning, while the conventional Q-learning updates operate at the inner level. To make it tractable, we propose a practical algorithm using a multi-armed bandit mechanism. This is guided by a surrogate objective approximating the bi-level gradient, which simultaneously maintains offline priors and prevents value overestimation. Our empirical results demonstrate that this approach consistently outperforms existing data replay methods across various datasets, eliminating the need for manual, context-specific adjustments while achieving superior stability and asymptotic performance.

</details>


### [294] [Enjoy Your Layer Normalization with the Computational Efficiency of RMSNorm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14521)
*Yuxin Guo,Yihao Yue,Yunhao Ni,Yizhou Ruan,Jie Luo,Wenjun Wu,Lei Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种框架，用于判断任意DNN中的层归一化（LN）能否被RMSNorm替代而不改变模型功能。核心思想是通过列中心约束（CCC）和列权重中心化（CBWC）将LN的中心化操作折叠到上游线性层中。实验表明许多架构中的LN是可折叠的，可实现2%-12%的端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LN虽然有效但引入了非可忽略的推理开销；RMSNorm虽去除了中心化操作提升了效率，但可能丢失中心化带来的好处。作者希望在不改变模型功能的前提下，找到一种方法将LN替换为更高效的RMSNorm。

Method: 提出"可折叠LN"概念，通过列中心约束（CCC）和列权重中心化（CBWC）将LN的中心化操作折叠到上游的一般线性层中；开发了基于图的检测算法来识别任意DNN中的可折叠LN。

Result: 许多广泛使用的架构（如Transformer）中的LN是可折叠的；可实现2%-12%的端到端推理加速；在部分打破精确等价性的实际训练场景中，该方法与原始LN相比仍具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 通过将LN的中心化操作折叠到上游线性层，可以无损地将LN替换为RMSNorm，在保持模型预测不变的同时提升推理效率。

Abstract: Layer normalization (LN) is a fundamental component in modern deep learning, but its per-sample centering and scaling introduce non-negligible inference overhead. RMSNorm improves efficiency by removing the centering operation, yet this may discard benefits associated with centering. This paper propose a framework to determine whether an LN in an arbitrary DNN can be replaced by RMSNorm without changing the model function. The key idea is to fold LN's centering operation into upstream general linear layers by enforcing zero-mean outputs through the column-centered constraint (CCC) and column-based weight centering (CBWC). We extend the analysis to arbitrary DNNs, define such LNs as foldable LNs, and develop a graph-based detection algorithm. Our analysis shows that many LNs in widely used architectures are foldable, enabling exact inference-time conversion and end-to-end acceleration of 2% to 12% without changing model predictions. Experiments across multiple task families further show that, when exact equivalence is partially broken in practical training settings, our method remains competitive with vanilla LN while improving efficiency.

</details>


### [295] [Lang2MLIP: End-to-End Language-to-Machine Learning Interatomic Potential Development with Autonomous Agentic Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14527)
*Wenwen Li,Yuki Orimo,Nontawat Charoenphakdee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Lang2MLIP，一个基于多智能体和大语言模型的框架，能将自然语言输入转化为机器学习原子间势能（MLIP）的自动化开发流程，无需预定义流水线，通过智能体自主决策和自纠正来适应复杂材料系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLIP自动化流水线通常假设固定阶段序列或依赖领域专家，缺乏对异构材料系统的适应性，非专家使用门槛高。因此需要一种更灵活、自动化、无需预定义流程的MLIP开发方法。

Method: 提出Lang2MLIP多智能体框架，将MLIP开发建模为序贯决策问题，由LLM驱动的决策智能体在每个步骤观察当前数据集、模型、评估结果和执行日志，自动选择合适动作来改进模型，支持自我纠正和回溯。

Result: 在包含多组分和多界面的固态电解质界面（SEI）系统上进行了评估，结果表明该方法有效可行。

Conclusion: 基于LLM的多智能体系统是自动化MLIP开发、降低非专家使用门槛的一个有前景的方向。

Abstract: Developing machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for complex materials systems remains challenging because it requires expertise in atomistic simulations, machine learning, and workflow design, as well as iterative active learning procedures. Existing automated pipelines typically assume a fixed sequence of stages or depend on domain experts, which limits their adaptability to heterogeneous materials systems where the optimal curriculum is not known in advance. To lower the barrier to developing MLIPs for non-experts, we propose Lang2MLIP, a multi-agent framework that takes natural-language input and formulates end-to-end MLIP development as a sequential decision-making problem solved by large language models (LLMs). At each step, a decision-making agent observes the current dataset, model, evaluation results, and execution log, and then automatically selects an appropriate action to improve the model. This removes the need for a predefined pipeline and enables the agent to self-correct by revisiting earlier subsystems when new failures arise. We evaluate this approach on a solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) system with multiple components and interfaces. These results suggest that LLM-based multi-agent systems are a promising direction for automating MLIP development and making it more accessible to non-experts.

</details>


### [296] [Resolving Action Bottleneck: Agentic Reinforcement Learning Informed by Token-Level Energy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14558)
*Langzhou He,Junyou Zhu,Yue Zhou,Zhengyao Gu,Junhua Liu,Wei-Chieh Huang,Henry Peng Zou,David Wipf,Philip S. Yu,Qitian Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ActFocus方法，通过重加权动作令牌的梯度信号，解决了现有策略梯度方法（如PPO、GRPO）在强化学习训练大语言模型时对推理令牌和动作令牌统一信用分配导致的训练信号错配问题（即Action Bottleneck现象），在无额外开销下显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有策略梯度方法（PPO、GRPO）对轨迹中所有令牌（包括长推理链和短动作令牌）进行均匀信用分配，导致训练信号被大量推理令牌稀释，动作令牌（真正与环境交互的关键部分）得不到有效强化信号，存在严重的训练信号错配问题。

Method: 从能量模型视角出发，量化令牌级训练信号与奖励方差的相关性，发现信号集中在动作令牌上（即Action Bottleneck现象）。据此提出ActFocus方法：1）对推理令牌的梯度进行降权；2）引入基于能量的再分配机制，对不确定性更高的动作令牌赋予更大权重。

Result: 在四个不同环境及多种模型规模上，ActFocus相比PPO和GRPO，最终步骤收益分别提升高达65.2和63.7个百分点，且无需额外运行时或内存开销。

Conclusion: 均匀信用分配是现有RL训练LLM方法的低效根源，专注于动作令牌的梯度加权是一种简单有效的改进策略，为未来强化学习与大语言模型的结合提供了新方向。

Abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning trains large language models using multi-turn trajectories that interleave long reasoning traces with short environment-facing actions. Common policy-gradient methods, such as PPO and GRPO, treat each token in a trajectory equally, leading to uniform credit assignment. In this paper, we critically demonstrate that such uniform credit assignment largely misallocates token-level training signals. From an energy-based modeling perspective, we show that token-level training signals, quantified by their correlations with reward variance of different rollouts sampled from a given prompt, concentrate sharply on action tokens rather than reasoning tokens, even though action tokens account for only a small fraction of the trajectory. We refer to this phenomenon as the Action Bottleneck. Motivated by this observation, we propose an embarrassingly simple token reweighting approach, ActFocus, that downweights gradients on reasoning tokens, along with an additional energy-based redistribution mechanism that further increases the weights on action tokens with higher uncertainty. Across four environments and different model sizes, ActFocus consistently outperforms PPO and GRPO, yielding final-step gains of up to 65.2 and 63.7 percentage points, respectively, without any additional runtime or memory cost.

</details>


### [297] [Exploring Geographic Relative Space in Large Language Models through Activation Patching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14535)
*Stef De Sabbata,Rahul Baiju,Stefano Mizzaro,Kevin Roitero*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过激活修补（activation patching）这一机械可解释性工具，研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）如何处理相对地理空间，并对LLMs在地理学中的安全性提出质疑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在地理学中的使用日益增加，但其内部工作机制尚不明确，这引发了对其安全性的担忧。作者希望通过机制可解释性方法，探究LLMs如何理解相对地理空间。

Method: 采用激活修补（activation patching）这一机械可解释性方法，分析LLMs在处理相对地理空间时的内部表征和计算机制。

Result: 尚未在摘要中明确给出具体实验结果，但研究聚焦于揭示LLMs对相对地理空间的处理模式。

Conclusion: LLMs在地理学中的安全应用需要更深入理解其内部机制，激活修补提供了有价值的研究工具。

Abstract: The increased use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in geography raises substantial questions about the safety of integrating these tools across a wide range of processes and analyses, given our very limited understanding of their inner workings. In this extended abstract, we examine how LLMs process relative geographic space using activation patching, an emerging tool for mechanistic interpretability.

</details>


### [298] [RxEval: A Prescription-Level Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Medication Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14543)
*Shuhao Chen,Weisen Jiang,Changmiao Wang,Xiaoqing Wu,Xuanren Shi,Yu Zhang,James T. Kwok*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了RxEval，一个处方级别的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型的处方能力。与现有方法不同，RxEval通过多选题形式，要求模型根据患者详细信息和时间顺序的临床轨迹，选择具体的药物-剂量-给药途径三元组。测试包含1,547个问题，覆盖584名患者、18个诊断类别和969种药物。评估16个LLM结果显示F1分数在45.18-77.10之间，最佳精确匹配仅46.10%，表明该基准具有挑战性和区分度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有住院用药推荐基准存在两个主要问题：一是将任务简化为入院级别的粗粒度药物代码预测，使用多热诊断和程序代码作为输入；二是未能捕捉真实处方过程中每个时间点的丰富信息。因此，需要构建一个更接近临床真实场景的处方级基准来评估LLM的处方能力。

Method: 构建RxEval基准：设计多选题形式，每道题提供详细的患者档案和时间排序的临床轨迹，要求模型从真实处方和通过推理链扰动生成的干扰项中选择正确的药物-剂量-给药途径三元组。数据集包含1,547个问题，覆盖584名患者、18个诊断类别和969种药物。

Result: 评估16个LLM，F1分数范围从45.18到77.10，最佳精确匹配率仅为46.10%。表明该基准具有挑战性和良好的区分度。

Conclusion: RxEval基准有效揭示了当前LLM在处方任务中的局限性，即使是前沿模型也可能忽略已提供的患者信息并无法得出正确的临床结论。

Abstract: Inpatient medication recommendation requires clinicians to repeatedly select specific medications, doses, and routes as a patient's condition evolves. Existing benchmarks formulate this task as admission-level prediction over coarse drug codes with multi-hot diagnostic and procedure code inputs, failing to capture the per-timepoint, information-rich nature of real prescribing. We propose RxEval, a prescription-level benchmark that evaluates LLM prescribing capability by multiple-choice questions: each question presents a detailed patient profile and time-ordered clinical trajectory, requiring selection of specific medication-dose-route triples from real prescriptions and patient-specific distractors generated via reasoning-chain perturbation. RxEval comprises 1,547 questions spanning 584 patients, 18 diagnostic categories, and 969 unique medications. Evaluation of 16 LLMs shows that RxEval is both challenging and discriminative: F1 ranges from 45.18 to 77.10 across models, and the best Exact Match is only 46.10%. Error analysis reveals that even frontier models may overlook stated patient information and fail to derive clinical conclusions.

</details>


### [299] [Discovering Physical Directions in Weight Space: Composing Neural PDE Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14546)
*Pengkai Wang,Pengwei Liu,Yuanyi Wang,Guanyu Chen,Xingyu Ren,Xiaolong Li,Zhongkai Hao,Yuting Kong,Qixin Zhang,Dong Ni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究神经算子在不同物理参数域下的微调权重更新结构，发现其可分解为家族共享适应和沿物理参数方向的分量，并提出Calibration-Conditioned Merge (CCM)方法，通过物理元数据或短观测前缀推断目标组合坐标，实现无需训练的跨PDE域迁移，在反应扩散、Navier-Stokes等基准上显著降低分布外滚动误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在连续物理族中，共享算子微调后得到多个域的专家模型，但权重空间更新究竟是孤立的域专家还是揭示了可复用的物理结构尚不清楚。

Method: 首先将端点专家更新分解为家族共享适应和沿物理参数方向的分量；然后提出CCM方法，利用物理元数据或短观测前缀推断目标组合坐标，合并端点专家得到单一检查点用于后续滚动预测。

Result: 在反应扩散、二维Navier-Stokes和径向溃坝共3个基准上，CCM在分布外区域分别减少54.2%、42.8%和13.8%的滚动误差。

Conclusion: 端点微调并非任意的检查点漂移，而是揭示了可标定的物理方向，支持无需训练的跨PDE域迁移。

Abstract: Recent advances in neural operators have made partial differential equation (PDE) surrogate modeling increasingly scalable and transferable through large-scale pretraining and in-context adaptation. However, after a shared operator is fine-tuned to multiple regimes within a continuous physical family, it remains unclear whether the resulting weight-space updates merely form isolated regime experts or reveal reusable physical structure. Starting from a shared family anchor, we fine-tune low- and high-regime endpoint experts and show that their updates can be separated into a family-shared adaptation and a direction aligned with the underlying physical parameter. This separation reinterprets endpoint experts as finite-difference probes of a local physical direction in weight space, explaining why static averaging can interpolate between regimes but attenuates endpoint-specific physics. Building on this perspective, we propose Calibration-Conditioned Merge (CCM), a post-hoc coordinate readout method for composing neural PDE experts along this physical direction. Given physical metadata, a calibrated coordinate mapping, or a short observed rollout prefix, CCM infers the target composition coordinate and deploys a single merged checkpoint for the remaining rollout. We evaluate CCM on the reaction--diffusion system, viscosity-parameterized two-dimensional Navier--Stokes equations, and radial dam-break dynamics. Across these benchmarks, CCM achieves its strongest gains in extrapolative regimes, reducing out-of-distribution rollout error relative to the family anchor by 54.2%, 42.8%, and 13.8%, respectively. Further experiments across FNO scales, a DPOT-style backbone, and ablations confirm that endpoint fine-tuning is not arbitrary checkpoint drift, but reveals a calibratable physical direction for training-free transfer across PDE regimes.

</details>


### [300] [Multi-Dimensional Model Integrity and Responsibility Assessment Index and Scoring Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14550)
*Phuc Truong Loc Nguyen,Thanh Hung Do,Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen,Hung Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MIRAI框架，统一评估表格模型在可解释性、公平性、鲁棒性、隐私性和可持续性五个维度的表现，实验表明高预测性能不等于高综合完整性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前高风险的表格数据领域仍主要依赖预测性能评估模型，而可解释性、公平性、鲁棒性、隐私性和可持续性等重要维度被孤立评估，缺乏统一框架。

Method: 提出MIRAI统一评估框架，通过归一化和方向对齐的维度分数，将五个维度的指标聚合为单一得分，在可控对比设置下比较不同架构的表格模型。

Result: 在医疗、金融和社会经济数据集上实验发现，高预测性能并不保证更好的整体完整性和责任性，某些简单模型比复杂深度表格架构具有更优的跨维度平衡。

Conclusion: MIRAI为受监管场景下的负责任模型选择提供了紧凑且实用的基础。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence in high-stakes tabular domains cannot be evaluated by predictive performance alone, yet current practice still assesses explainability, fairness, robustness, privacy, and sustainability mostly in isolation. We propose the Model Integrity and Responsibility Assessment Index (MIRAI), a unified evaluation framework that measures tabular models across these five dimensions under a controlled comparison setting and aggregates them into a single score. MIRAI combines established metrics through normalized and direction-aligned dimension scores, which enables direct comparison across models with different architectural and computational profiles. Experiments on healthcare, financial, and socioeconomic datasets show that higher predictive performance does not necessarily imply better overall integrity and responsibility. In several cases, simpler models achieve a stronger cross-dimensional balance than more complex deep tabular architectures. MIRAI provides a compact and practical basis for responsible model selection in regulated settings.

</details>


### [301] [SeesawNet: Towards Non-stationary Time Series Forecasting with Balanced Modeling of Common and Specific Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14551)
*Hao Li,Lu Zhang,Liu Chong,Yankai Chen,Pengyang Wang,Yingjie Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SeesawNet通过自适应平稳-非平稳注意力机制，动态平衡时序预测中通用依赖与实例特定依赖的建模，在多个真实基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实例归一化方法虽能减少分布偏移，但会过度平滑实例特定的结构信息，而先前方法未能自适应地根据每个实例的非平稳特性来平衡通用依赖与实例特定依赖的建模。

Method: 提出SeesawNet统一架构，核心是自适应平稳-非平稳注意力(ASNA)，从归一化序列捕获通用依赖、从原始序列捕获特定依赖，并根据实例级非平稳性自适应融合；在此基础上交替建模时序和通道关系以捕获长程和跨变量依赖。

Result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上，SeesawNet持续优于当前最先进的方法。

Conclusion: SeesawNet有效解决了实例归一化中通用与特定依赖难以平衡的核心矛盾，为处理非平稳多元时间序列预测提供了统一且高效的方案。

Abstract: Instance normalization (IN) is widely used in non-stationary multivariate time series forecasting to reduce distribution shifts and highlight common patterns across samples. However, IN can over-smooth instance-specific structural information that is essential for modeling temporal and cross-channel heterogeneity. While prior methods further suppress distribution discrepancies or attempt to recover temporal specific dependencies, they often ignore a central tension: how to adaptively model common and instance-specific dependency based on each instance's non-stationary structures. To address this dilemma, we propose SeesawNet, a unified architecture that dynamically balances common and instance-specific dependency modeling in both temporal and channel dimensions. At its core is Adaptive Stationary-Nonstationary Attention (ASNA), which captures common dependencies from normalized sequences and specific dependencies from raw sequences, and adaptively fuses them according to instance-level non-stationarity. Built upon ASNA, SeesawNet alternates dedicated temporal and channel relationship modeling to jointly capture long-range and cross-variable dependencies. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world benchmarks demonstrate that SeesawNet consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [302] [Efficient Multi-objective Prompt Optimization via Pure-exploration Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14553)
*Donghao Li,Chengshuai Shi,Weijuan Ou,Cong Shen,Jing Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多目标提示词选择问题，将问题形式化为纯探索多目标bandit框架，提出了两种设置下的高效算法（Pareto最优提示集恢复和可行最优提示识别），并在多个LLM上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有提示工程研究大多只关注单一指标，忽略了提示性能的多面性（如准确率、效率、安全性等）。本文旨在弥补这一空白，将多目标优化引入提示选择问题。

Method: 将多目标提示选择问题形式化为纯探索bandit框架，提出两种设置：1) Pareto最优提示集恢复；2) 可行最优提示识别。在结构化bandit中引入新设计，并提供线性情况下的理论保证。

Result: 在多个LLM上的实验表明，基于bandit的方法显著优于基线方法，建立了多目标提示优化的高效框架。

Conclusion: 多目标bandit方法为提示选择提供了原则性且高效的解决方案，能够有效处理提示性能的多维评估需求。

Abstract: Prompt engineering has become central to eliciting the capabilities of large language models (LLMs). At its core lies prompt selection -- efficiently identifying the most effective prompts. However, most prior investigations overlook a key challenge: the inherently multi-faceted nature of prompt performance, which cannot be captured by a single metric. To fill this gap, we study the multi-objective prompt selection problem under two practical settings: Pareto prompt set recovery and best feasible prompt identification. Casting the problem into the pure-exploration bandits framework, we adapt provably efficient algorithms from multi-objective bandits and further introduce a novel design for best feasible arm identification in structured bandits, with theoretical guarantees on the identification error in the linear case. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs show that the bandit-based approaches yield significant improvements over baselines, establishing a principled and efficient framework for multi-objective prompt optimization.

</details>


### [303] [Boosting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards via Randomly Selected Few-Shot Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15012)
*Kai Yan,Alexander G. Schwing,Yu-Xiong Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FEST算法，仅用128条示范数据通过监督信号、在策略信号和衰减权重三大组件实现与全量SFT数据相当的RLVR性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR在数学和编码等任务中表现优异，但面对困难问题时正确轨迹生成困难、样本效率低；现有的示范引导RLVR依赖大量SFT数据，获取成本高。

Method: 提出FEST（Few-Shot demonstration-guided RLVR）算法，核心包含三个组件：1）监督信号（SFT loss）；2）在策略信号（on-policy RL loss）；3）对少量SFT数据施加衰减权重以防止多轮训练过拟合。

Result: 仅用128条随机选取的示范数据，FEST在多个基准上显著优于基线方法，甚至达到使用全量SFT数据的性能水平。

Conclusion: 少量高质量的示范数据配合恰当的训练机制（监督+在策略+衰减权重）即可高效引导RLVR，大幅降低对大规模SFT数据的依赖。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has achieved great success in developing Large Language Models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought rollouts for many tasks such as math and coding. Nevertheless, RLVR struggles with sample efficiency on difficult problems where correct rollouts are hard to generate. Prior works propose to address this issue via demonstration-guided RLVR, i.e., to conduct Supervised FineTuning (SFT) when RL fails; however, SFT often requires a lot of data, which can be expensive to acquire. In this paper, we propose FEST, a FEw-ShoT demonstration-guided RLVR algorithm. It attains compelling results with only 128 demonstrations randomly selected from an SFT dataset. We find that three components are vital for the success: supervised signal, on-policy signal, and decaying weights on the few-shot SFT dataset to prevent overfitting from multiple-epoch training. On several benchmarks, FEST outperforms baselines with magnitudes less SFT data, even matching their performance with full dataset.

</details>


### [304] [Woodelf++: A Fast and Unified Partial Dependence Plot Algorithm for Decision Tree Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14578)
*Ron Wettenstein,Alexander Nadel,Udi Boker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Woodelf++，一种统一且高效的方法，用于在决策树集成模型上计算部分依赖图（PDP）、联合PDP、任意阶部分依赖交互值（Any-Order-PDIVs）以及全新的全量PDP（Full PDP）。该方法在效率上大幅超越现有技术，尤其在Any-Order-PDIVs任务上实现了指数级加速，最高可比scikit-learn快五个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PDP、Joint-PDP和PDIVs是广泛使用的模型可解释性工具，但现有方法计算效率低下，尤其是Any-Order-PDIVs在特征子集上的计算几乎不可行。作者希望提出统一且高效的计算框架来解决这一问题。

Method: 基于Woodelf（高效SHAP计算算法），通过推导适用于伪布尔函数的度量，将PDP、Joint-PDP和Any-Order-PDIVs统一在同一框架下计算。同时提出Full PDP，利用模型的划分阈值忠实捕捉所有可能特征值上的模型行为。

Result: 在40万行数据集上，PDP和Joint-PDP比现有最优方法快6倍，比scikit-learn快五个数量级。Any-Order-PDIVs仅需5分钟，而现有最优方法估计需要超过100万年。支持GPU加速，纯Python实现。

Conclusion: Woodelf++在效率上取得了数量级级别的突破，使得原本计算不可行的可解释性工具（如Any-Order-PDIVs）变得实际可用，并且通过Full PDP进一步丰富了模型分析的维度。

Abstract: Partial Dependence Plots (PDPs) visualize how changes in a single feature affect the average model prediction. They are widely used in practice to interpret decision tree ensembles and other machine learning models. Joint-PDPs extend this idea to pairs of features, revealing their combined effect. Partial Dependence Interaction Values (PDIVs) measure feature interactions. The Any-Order-PDIVs task computes these interactions for every feature subset across all rows of the dataset.
  We introduce Woodelf++, a unified and efficient approach for computing all these useful explainability tools on decision tree ensembles, building on Woodelf, an algorithm for efficient SHAP computation. By deriving suitable metrics over pseudo-Boolean functions, Woodelf++ can compute PDPs (exact and approximate), Joint-PDPs, and Any-Order-PDIVs in a unified framework. Our method delivers substantial complexity improvements over the state of the art, including an exponential gain for Any-Order-PDIVs. Additionally, we introduce and efficiently compute Full PDPs, which leverage the model's split thresholds to faithfully capture its behavior across all possible feature values.
  Woodelf++ is implemented in pure Python and supports GPU acceleration. On a dataset with 400,000 rows, Woodelf++ computes PDP and Joint-PDP up to 6x faster than the state of the art and up to five orders of magnitude faster than scikit-learn. For Any-Order-PDIVs, the gap is even larger: Woodelf++ computes all interaction values in 5 minutes, while the state of the art is estimated to require over 1,000,000 years.

</details>


### [305] [Angel or Demon: Investigating the Plasticity Interventions' Impact on Backdoor Threats in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14587)
*Oubo Ma,Ruixiao Lin,Yang Dai,Jiahao Chen,Chunyi Zhou,Linkang Du,Shouling Ji*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了14,664种情况下深度强化学习的可塑性干预对后门攻击的影响，发现只有SAM干预会加剧后门威胁，其他干预均能缓解。通过病理分析揭示了梯度放大和激活路径中断等机制，并提出了SCC框架和后门检测指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前人研究主要关注基础场景下的DRL后门攻击，但现代DRL中普遍使用的可塑性干预（plasticity interventions）对后门漏洞的影响尚未被系统研究，这种研究空白给实际DRL部署带来安全风险。

Method: 对14,664种场景进行大规模实证研究，涵盖多种代表性可塑性干预和后门攻击场景；通过病理分析（pathological analysis）探索干预影响后门的底层机制。

Result: (1) 只有SAM（Sharpness-Aware Minimization）会加剧后门威胁，其他干预均缓解后门攻击；(2) SAM的恶化机制是后门梯度放大；(3) 其他干预的缓解机制是激活路径中断和表征空间压缩。

Conclusion: 提出了SCC概念框架用于理解DRL中干预与后门的机制性相互作用，并发现异常损失景观锐度（abnormal loss landscape sharpness）可作为DRL后门检测的关键指标。

Abstract: Extensive research has highlighted the severe threats posed by backdoor attacks to deep reinforcement learning (DRL). However, prior studies primarily focus on vanilla scenarios, while plasticity interventions have emerged as indispensable built-in components of modern DRL agents. Despite their effectiveness in mitigating plasticity loss, the impact of these interventions on DRL backdoor vulnerabilities remains underexplored, and this lack of systematic investigation poses risks in practical DRL deployments. To bridge this gap, we empirically study 14,664 cases integrating representative interventions and attack scenarios. We find that only one intervention (i.e., SAM) exacerbates backdoor threats, while other interventions mitigate them. Pathological analysis identifies that the exacerbation is attributed to backdoor gradient amplification, while the mitigation stems from activation pathway disruption and representation space compression. From these findings, we derive two novel insights: (1) a conceptual framework SCC for robust backdoor injection that deconstructs the mechanistic interplay between interventions and backdoors in DRL, and (2) abnormal loss landscape sharpness as a key indicator for DRL backdoor detection.

</details>


### [306] [Silent Collapse in Recursive Learning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14588)
*Zhipeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现递归学习中存在“静默崩溃”现象——模型内部分布逐渐收缩，而常规指标保持稳定。提出基于三个轨迹级前兆的MTR框架，可在不依赖原始数据的情况下实现早期预警与主动预防。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准性能指标（损失、困惑度、准确率）在递归学习（模型用自身旧版本生成的数据训练）中无法检测到内部退化，直到退化不可逆转才被发现。

Method: 先识别出静默崩溃的三个轨迹级前兆：（1）锚点熵收缩（2）表征漂移冻结（3）尾覆盖度侵蚀。基于此提出MTR框架——一个轻量元认知循环，监控轨迹统计量、估计慢时间尺度信任变量、自适应调节学习强度。

Result: MTR能够在标准验证指标退化前多个世代就发出早期预警，并主动防止静默崩溃的发生，且无需依赖原始数据。

Conclusion: 静默崩溃是递归学习中的关键隐患，MTR框架提供了一种不依赖原始数据的有效预防方案，对原始数据不可用、被污染或涉及隐私的场景尤为关键。

Abstract: Recursive learning -- where models are trained on data generated by previous versions of themselves -- is increasingly common in large language models, autonomous agents, and self-supervised systems. However, standard performance metrics (loss, perplexity, accuracy) often fail to detect internal degradation before it becomes irreversible. Here we identify a phenomenon we call silent collapse: under broad recursive conditions, model internal distributions -- predictive entropy, representational diversity, and tail coverage -- progressively contract even as conventional metrics appear stable or improving.
  We discover that silent collapse is not abrupt. Its onset is reliably preceded by three trajectory-level precursors: (1) contraction of anchor entropy, (2) freezing of representation drift, and (3) erosion of tail coverage. These signals manifest multiple generations before any degradation in standard validation metrics, enabling early warning.
  Based on these precursors, we propose the MTR (Monitor--Trust--Regulator) framework, a lightweight metacognitive loop that monitors trajectory statistics, estimates a slow-timescale trust variable, and adaptively modulates the effective learning intensity. MTR provides early warning and actively prevents silent collapse without requiring access to pristine real data -- a critical advantage when original data is unavailable, contaminated, or private.

</details>


### [307] [Fast Rates for Inverse Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14599)
*Andreas Schlaginhaufen,Maryam Kamgarpour*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对线性奖励类、有限时域、Borel状态与动作空间上的熵正则化最小-最大逆强化学习(Min-Max-IRL)，建立了新的结构与统计结果。结构上证明了MLE与Min-Max-IRL在总体水平等价，且在确定性动力学下经验水平等价。统计上证明了轨迹级KL散度与Hessian范数下的平方参数误差以O(n^{-1})快速收敛，适用于模型误设定且无需探索假设。进一步将奖励可识别性结果推广到一般Borel空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有逆强化学习方法在一般Borel状态与动作空间的统计收敛性理论尚不完善，且对最大似然估计与Min-Max-IRL之间关系的理解不足。本文旨在填补这些理论空白，建立结构等价性并推导快速统计收敛率。

Method: 利用伪自相容性(Pseudo-self-concordance)分析Min-Max-IRL损失函数，结合线性奖励函数类的结构性质，在有限时域MDP框架下建立MLE与Min-Max-IRL的等价性，并通过损失函数的二阶性质推导出收敛速率。

Result: 1) 在总体水平上MLE与Min-Max-IRL等价，在确定性动力学下经验水平也等价；2) 轨迹级KL散度和参数误差以O(n^{-1})速率收敛；3) 结果适用于模型误设定且无需探索假设；4) 将奖励可识别性结果推广到一般Borel空间。

Conclusion: 本文为熵正则化Min-Max-IRL提供了严谨的理论基础，展示了其快速收敛特性，并拓展了理论框架的适用范围，为高维或连续状态动作空间中的逆强化学习提供了理论保障。

Abstract: We establish novel structural and statistical results for entropy-regularized min-max inverse reinforcement learning (Min-Max-IRL) with linear reward classes in finite-horizon MDPs with Borel state and action spaces. On the structural side, we show that maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) and Min-Max-IRL are equivalent at the population level, and at the empirical level under deterministic dynamics. On the statistical side, exploiting pseudo-self-concordance of the Min-Max-IRL loss, we prove that both the trajectory-level KL divergence and the squared parameter error in the Hessian norm decay at the fast rate $\mathcal{O}(n^{-1})$, where $n$ is the number of expert trajectories. Our guarantees apply under misspecification and require no exploration assumptions. We further extend reward-identifiability results to general Borel spaces and derive novel results on the derivatives of the soft-optimal value function with respect to reward parameters.

</details>


### [308] [An Amortized Efficiency Threshold for Comparing Neural and Heuristic Solvers in Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14624)
*Sohaib Afifi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文批判了“神经组合优化求解器因训练能耗高而效率低于CPU元启发式”的观点，提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架，指出在足够多的部署实例下神经求解器在总能耗/碳排放上可超越元启发式基线，并在n=20的MTVRP实验中验证了交叉点约为1.58×10^5次实例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纠正“训练昂贵→神经求解器净效率低”这一常见的错误推论，明确训练成本与部署成本不可直接比较，需要引入部署量这一关键变量。

Method: 提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架：定义神经求解器在总能耗/碳排放上超越元启发式基线所需的部署实例数量；证明当神经求解器在单实例上胜出时，累计能耗比趋近于小于1的常数，该极限独立于训练成本测量方式；将硬件制造嵌入碳排放对称地摊销到两侧。

Result: 在MTVRP环境（n=20，19个变体，5个训练种子）中，以HGS/PyVRP为基线，测得交叉点约1.58×10^5实例，单实例能耗比为0.41。

Conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出了AET框架、开放工具和测量协议；大问题规模下比值的结构性收敛留待未来工作。

Abstract: A common critique of neural combinatorial-optimization solvers is that they are less energy-efficient than CPU metaheuristics, given the operational energy cost of training them on GPUs. This paper examines the inferential step from "training is expensive" to "neural solvers are net-inefficient", which is where the critique actually goes wrong. Training the network costs a large fixed amount of GPU energy; running the metaheuristic costs a small amount of CPU energy on every instance, repeated as long as the solver is deployed. The two are not commensurable until a deployment volume is fixed. We define the Amortized Efficiency Threshold (AET) as the deployment volume above which a neural solver breaks even with a heuristic baseline in total energy or carbon, under an explicit constraint on solution quality. We show that the cumulative-energy ratio between the two solvers tends to a constant strictly below one whenever the network wins per-instance, and that this limit does not depend on how the training cost was measured. An embodied-carbon term amortizes hardware fabrication symmetrically on both sides. We instantiate the framework on the Multi-Task VRP (MTVRP) environment at n=20 customers across 19 problem variants and five training seeds, with HGS via PyVRP as the heuristic baseline. The measured crossover sits near $1.58 \times 10^5$ deployed instances; the per-instance ratio is 0.41, reflecting the moderate size of the instances tested. The contribution is the framework, the open instrumentation, and the measurement protocol; structural convergence of the ratio at larger problem sizes is left to future empirical work.

</details>


### [309] [Proposal and study of statistical features for string similarity computation and classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15110)
*E. O. Rodrigues,D. Casanova,M. Teixeira,V. Pegorini,F. Favarim,E. Clua,A. Conci,Panos Liatsis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将视觉计算中的共现矩阵（COM）和游程矩阵（RLM）改编为通用字符串相似度计算方法，实验表明在合成数据和真实文本抄袭检测中均优于现有统计特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有字符串相似度计算方法多依赖语言结构或语法信息，缺乏通用性。作者希望提出一种纯粹统计的、与语言无关的字符串相似度特征，适用于任何语言或上下文。

Method: 将视觉计算中的共现矩阵（COM）和游程矩阵（RLM）改编为字符串相似度计算特征，并与最长公共子序列、最大连续最长公共子序列、互信息和编辑距离等统计方法进行比较。

Result: 在合成实验中，COM和RLM特征优于其他最先进的统计特征，4个案例中3个的统计显著性高于基于距离的第二好方法（P<0.001）。在真实文本抄袭数据集中，RLM特征取得了最佳结果。

Conclusion: COM和RLM作为纯粹统计的、与语言无关的字符串相似度特征，在多个实验场景中表现优异，具有很好的通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Adaptations of features commonly applied in the field of visual computing, co-occurrence matrix (COM) and run-length matrix (RLM), are proposed for the similarity computation of strings in general (words, phrases, codes and texts). The proposed features are not sensitive to language related information. These are purely statistical and can be used in any context with any language or grammatical structure. Other statistical measures that are commonly employed in the field such as longest common subsequence, maximal consecutive longest common subsequence, mutual information and edit distances are evaluated and compared. In the first synthetic set of experiments, the COM and RLM features outperform the remaining state-of-the-art statistical features. In 3 out of 4 cases, the RLM and COM features were statistically more significant than the second best group based on distances (P-value < 0.001). When it comes to a real text plagiarism dataset, the RLM features obtained the best results.

</details>


### [310] [Action-Inspired Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14631)
*Eshwar R. A.,Debnath Pal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出动作启发生成模型（AGMs），一种双网络生成框架，通过一个轻量级学习标量势 Vφ 对桥接样本进行在线评分并调制漂移目标，选择性地惩罚无信息传输路径，在不增加推理开销的情况下持续提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有桥接匹配方法对传输景观中的每个随机跃迁赋予统一回归权重，无论该桥接样本是沿着结构连贯的轨迹还是退化轨迹，这导致模型无法区分有效与无效的传输路径。

Method: 引入轻量级学习标量势 Vφ（仅占主漂移网络参数量的 ~1.4%），通过在线评分桥接样本并利用重要性权重调制漂移目标，采用停止梯度屏障防止两个网络之间的对抗反馈，同时保留 Vφ 的引导信号。

Result: 在保真度和覆盖度指标上，该方法持续提升了生成质量，且推理时无需保留 Vφ，仅使用标准欧拉-丸山积分即可完成。

Conclusion: AGMs 作为一种即插即用的增强方法，无需迭代半桥拟合或辅助 SDE 求解器，可无缝集成到任何桥接匹配训练循环中，有效改善生成质量。

Abstract: We introduce Action-Inspired Generative Models (AGMs), a dual-network generative framework motivated by the observation that existing bridge-matching methods assign uniform regression weight to every stochastic transition in the transport landscape, regardless of whether a given bridge sample lies along a structurally coherent trajectory or a degenerate one. We address this by introducing a lightweight learned scalar potential $V_φ$ that scores bridge samples online and modulates the drift objective via importance weights derived through a stop-gradient barrier -- preventing adversarial feedback between the two networks whilst preserving $V_φ$'s guiding signal. Crucially, $V_φ$ comprises only $\sim$1.4% of the primary drift network's parameter count, adds no overhead to the inference graph, and requires no iterative half-bridge fitting or auxiliary stochastic differential equation (SDE) solvers: it is a plug-and-play enhancement to any bridge-matching training loop. At inference, $V_φ$ is discarded entirely, leaving standard Euler-Maruyama integration of the exponential moving average (EMA) drift. We demonstrate that selectively penalising uninformative transport paths through the learned potential yields consistent improvements in generation quality across fidelity and coverage metrics.

</details>


### [311] [DRL-STAF: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for State-Aware Forecasting of Complex Multivariate Hidden Markov Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14632)
*Manrui Jiang,Jingru Huang,Yong Chen,Chen Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DRL-STAF框架，结合深度强化学习与隐马尔可夫模型，用于多变量隐马尔可夫过程的预测与隐状态估计，在非线性建模、状态空间爆炸缓解和预测性能上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在两难：深度学习模型预测精度高但缺乏显式状态建模，HMM可解释但难以处理复杂非线性发射和可扩展性。因此需要一种既能保持预测精度又能提供可靠隐状态估计的统一框架。

Method: DRL-STAF框架：1）使用深度神经网络建模复杂非线性发射；2）利用强化学习估计离散隐状态，无需预定义转移结构；3）有效缓解多变量HMM的状态空间爆炸问题。

Result: 在大多数情况下，DRL-STAF在预测性能上优于HMM变体、纯深度学习模型以及现有的DL-HMM混合模型，同时能提供可靠的隐状态估计结果。

Conclusion: DRL-STAF成功弥合了深度学习与HMM之间的鸿沟，兼具深度学习的预测能力和HMM的可解释性，为复杂多变量时间序列预测提供了一种新范式。

Abstract: Forecasting multivariate hidden Markov processes is challenging due to nonlinear and nonstationary observations, latent state transitions, and cross-sequence dependencies. While deep learning methods achieve strong predictive accuracy, they typically lack explicit state modeling, whereas Hidden Markov Models (HMMs) provide interpretable latent states but struggle with complex nonlinear emissions and scalability. To address these limitations, we propose DRL-STAF, a Deep Reinforcement Learning based STate-Aware Forecasting framework that jointly predicts next-step observations and estimates the corresponding hidden states for complex multivariate hidden Markov processes. Specifically, DRL-STAF models complex nonlinear emissions using deep neural networks and estimates discrete hidden states using reinforcement learning, reducing the reliance on predefined transition structures and enabling flexible adaptation to diverse temporal dynamics. In particular, DRL-STAF mitigates the state-space explosion encountered by typical multivariate HMM-based methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DRL-STAF outperforms HMM variants, standalone deep learning models, and existing DL-HMM hybrids in most cases, while also providing reliable hidden-state estimates.

</details>


### [312] [Forgetting That Sticks: Quantization-Permanent Unlearning via Circuit Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15138)
*Saisab Sadhu,Pratinav Seth,Vinay Kumar Sankarapu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有梯度类机器遗忘方法在量化后失效（遗忘恢复），而可抵抗量化的方法几乎不改变模型；作者提出MANSU，通过因果电路归因、电路受限零空间投影和参数幅度下限，首次在多个模型上同时实现有意义遗忘、保留保持、非正量化差距和结构性擦除。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 所有部署的语言模型都会先量化（如4-bit），但现有的机器遗忘评估仅在未量化的全精度下测量行为抑制，忽略了量化可能使已被遗忘的知识恢复的安全隐患。

Method: 1) 因果电路归因（Circuit Attribution）定位最小遗忘子图；2) 电路受限零空间投影（circuit-restricted null-space projection）结合对角Fisher保留约束；3) 每个参数设置幅度下限（magnitude floor）保证量化生存。同时提出CAD（Circuit Attribution Divergence）作为结构性擦除的验证指标。

Result: 梯度基线方法的参数更新量仅为量化bin宽度的1/47~1/828，量化后遗忘的知识恢复达+0.05准确率；MANSU在所有指标（遗忘、保留、非正量化差距、结构性擦除）上首次同时满足且有裕量。

Conclusion: 揭示了一个"稀疏性与持久性"的根本权衡：参数更新量过小无法跨越量化bin边界；MANSU通过结构化因果干预而非梯度微调，从根本上解决了量化下的遗忘失效问题。

Abstract: Standard unlearning evaluations measure behavioral suppression in full precision, immediately after training, despite every deployed language model being quantized first. Recent work has shown that 4-bit post-training quantization can reverse machine unlearning; we show this is not a tuning artefact but a systematic dual failure: gradient-based methods that achieve meaningful forgetting lose it under compression, while methods that survive quantization barely change the model. Both failures trace to the same root cause: across all baselines, per-parameter updates lie 47-828x below the NF4 quantization bin width; updates diffused across billions of parameters cannot clear quantization bin boundaries, a consequence we formalize as a sparsity-permanence tradeoff. We present MANSU (Mechanistic-Aligned Null-Space Unlearning), which resolves both modes by combining causal circuit attribution to isolate the minimal forget-set subgraph, circuit-restricted null-space projection with a diagonal-Fisher retain bound, and a per-parameter magnitude floor guaranteeing quantization survival by construction. We additionally introduce Circuit Attribution Divergence (CAD), a mechanistic verification metric distinguishing structural erasure from behavioral suppression, a distinction existing metrics cannot make. Across multiple model families and hazard benchmarks, MANSU is the first method to jointly satisfy all four properties with margin on each (meaningful forgetting, retain preservation, non-positive PTQ gap, and structural erasure), while gradient-based baselines recover up to +0.05 accuracy under compression.

</details>


### [313] [Unbiased and Second-Order-Free Training for High-Dimensional PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14643)
*Jaemin Seo,Surin Lee,Jae Yong Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文分析了BSDE方法中Euler-Maruyama离散化导致的损失偏差，并提出了一种无偏且免二阶导数的训练框架，兼顾计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BSDE方法虽能避免维度灾难且无需Hessian计算，但常用的EM时间离散化会引入固有偏差；高阶格式虽能消除偏差却需计算二阶导数，计算成本高。

Method: 对EM诱导的损失偏差进行理论分析，提出一种无偏且免二阶导数的训练框架，在保留BSDE计算优势的同时消除偏差。

Result: 提出的无偏框架消除了EM离散化带来的偏差，同时避免了二阶空间导数的计算，保持了计算效率优势。

Conclusion: 该方法在保持BSDE方法计算优势的前提下，有效解决了EM离散偏差问题，为高维PDE求解提供了更优方案。

Abstract: Deep learning methods based on backward stochastic differential equations (BSDEs) have emerged as competitive alternatives to physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for solving high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs). By leveraging probabilistic representations, BSDE approaches can avoid the curse of dimensionality and often admit second-order-free training objectives that do not require explicit Hessian evaluations. It has recently been established that the commonly used Euler-Maruyama (EM) time discretization induces an intrinsic bias in BSDE training losses. While high-order schemes such as Heun can fully eliminate this bias, such schemes re-introduce second-order spatial derivatives and incur substantial computational overhead. In this work, we provide a principled analysis of EM-induced loss bias and propose an unbiased, second-order-free training framework that preserves the computational advantages of BSDE methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/seojaemin22/Un-EM-BSDE.

</details>


### [314] [Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15155)
*Zhengxi Lu,Zhiyuan Yao,Zhuowen Han,Zi-Han Wang,Jinyang Wu,Qi Gu,Xunliang Cai,Weiming Lu,Jun Xiao,Yueting Zhuang,Yongliang Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SDAR方法，将OPSD作为门控辅助目标与RL结合，解决了多轮智能体训练中OPSD的不稳定性问题，在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-QA上显著优于GRPO和混合RL-OPSD基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨迹级别的RL奖励信号对长程交互提供粗粒度监督，而OPSD在多轮场景中存在复合不稳定性，且技能条件化特权指导需要非对称处理负面的教师拒绝信号。

Method: SDAR将OPSD作为门控辅助目标，RL为主优化目标。将解耦的token级信号映射到sigmoid门控，强化教师认可的正差距token，软衰减负面的教师拒绝信号。

Result: 在Qwen2.5和Qwen3系列上，SDAR在ALFWorld、WebShop、Search-QA上显著提升，相比GRPO分别提升+9.4%、+10.2%、+7.0%，避免了GRPO+OPSD的不稳定性。

Conclusion: SDAR通过门控机制有效融合RL和自蒸馏，解决了多轮智能体训练中的不稳定问题，在不同模型规模上持续优于混合基线。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a central paradigm for post-training LLM agents, yet its trajectory-level reward signal provides only coarse supervision for long-horizon interaction. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) complements RL by introducing dense token-level guidance from a teacher branch augmented with privileged context. However, transferring OPSD to multi-turn agents proves problematic: compounding multi-turn instability destabilizes supervision, while skill-conditioned privileged guidance requires asymmetric treatment for negative teacher rejections may arise from imperfect skills retrieval or utilization. We introduce SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning), which treats OPSD as a gated auxiliary objective while keeping RL as the primary optimization backbone. SDAR maps detached token-level signals into a sigmoid gate, strengthening distillation on teacher-endorsed positive-gap tokens and softly attenuating negative teacher rejections. Across the Qwen2.5 and Qwen3 families on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-QA, SDAR substantially improves over GRPO (+9.4% on ALFWorld, +7.0% on Search-QA, +10.2% on WebShop-Acc), avoids the instability of naive GRPO+OPSD, and consistently outperforms hybrid RL--OPSD baselines across model scales.

</details>


### [315] [Slower Generalization, Faster Memorization: A Sweet Spot in Algorithmic Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14659)
*Shin So,Kyelim Lee,Albert No*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 在结构化输出任务（Needleman-Wunsch矩阵生成）中，小Transformer存在一个最佳数据集大小，并非数据越多收敛越快；超过该临界点后，虽然仍能泛化但需要更多梯度更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"grokking"现象中关于临界数据量的自然直觉——即一旦数据足以识别底层规则，更多数据应加速验证收敛。作者想检验这一直觉在结构化输出任务中是否成立。

Method: 在Needleman-Wunsch（NW）矩阵生成这一受控结构化输出任务上训练小型Transformer，比较不同数据集大小下的验证精确匹配准确率和收敛所需梯度更新数，并以乘法基线任务作为对照。

Result: 1）NW任务中存在数据集大小的"甜点"：中等数据量下验证准确率最快达到最高，并非最大数据量最快；2）超过甜点后，泛化仍可实现但需更多更新；3）在部分验证能力首次出现的阶段，更大数据集反而能更快达到高训练准确率；4）乘法基线任务未表现这种"过阈值后变慢"现象。

Conclusion: 将"泛化开始所需的临界数据量"与"优化收敛所需的最优数据量"区分开来，表明在结构化输出任务中，学习规则与完成精确拟合可能发生背离，并非数据越多越好。

Abstract: Critical-data-size accounts of grokking suggest a natural post-threshold intuition: once training data is sufficient to identify the underlying rule, additional data should accelerate validation convergence. We show that this intuition can fail in a controlled structured-output task. In Needleman--Wunsch (NW) matrix generation, small Transformers reach high validation exact-match accuracy fastest at an intermediate dataset size, not at the largest one. Past this dataset-size sweet spot, generalization remains achievable but requires more gradient updates. Conversely, in the regime where partial validation competence first appears, larger datasets can require fewer updates to reach high training accuracy, suggesting that emerging rule structure can accelerate fitting beyond example-wise memorization. A multiplication baseline does not show the same post-threshold slowdown. These results separate the critical data size for the onset of generalization from the dataset size that optimizes update-based convergence, and identify structured-output tasks where learning the rule and completing exact-fitting can diverge.

</details>


### [316] [FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15188)
*Shashwat Goel,Nikhil Chandak,Arvindh Arun,Ameya Prabhu,Steffen Staab,Moritz Hardt,Maksym Andriushchenko,Jonas Geiping*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了FutureSim，一个通过回放真实世界新闻事件来评估AI Agent在动态开放环境中长期适应能力的新基准。测试发现最佳Agent预测准确率仅25%，许多甚至不如不预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准缺乏对AI Agent在动态、开放环境中适应新信息能力的评估，需要一种更真实、时间连续的测试方法。

Method: 构建FutureSim基准，回放2026年1月至3月真实世界新闻事件，要求Agent在知识截止日期后预测未来事件，同时模拟新闻按时间顺序到达、问题逐步解决的过程。

Result: 最佳Agent预测准确率仅25%，许多Agent的Brier技能得分甚至低于不作任何预测的基线。

Conclusion: FutureSim为研究长期测试时适应、搜索、记忆和不确定性推理等方向提供了现实场景，有助于衡量AI在真实世界长时间跨度上的开放适应能力。

Abstract: AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We build FutureSim, where agents forecast world events beyond their knowledge cutoff while interacting with a chronological replay of the world: real news articles arriving and questions resolving over the simulated period. We evaluate frontier agents in their native harness, testing their ability to predict world events over a three-month period from January to March 2026. FutureSim reveals a clear separation in their capabilities, with the best agent's accuracy being 25%, and many having worse Brier skill score than making no prediction at all. Through careful ablations, we show how FutureSim offers a realistic setting to study emerging research directions like long-horizon test-time adaptation, search, memory, and reasoning about uncertainty. Overall, we hope our benchmark design paves the way to measure AI progress on open-ended adaptation spanning long time-horizons in the real world.

</details>


### [317] [AQKA: Active Quantum Kernel Acquisition Under a Shot Budget](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14672)
*Jian Xu,Chao Li,Delu Zeng,John Paisley,Qibin Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AQKA自适应量子核学习算法，通过非均匀分配测量shot预算，在有限预算下比均匀分配方法提升8-32个百分点的分类准确率，并在真实量子硬件上验证了优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子核估计方法（如Nyström-QKE、ShoFaR）只选择哪些矩阵元素要测量，但在所选子集内仍然均匀分配测量shot，忽略了不同矩阵元素对下游分类任务重要性的差异，导致预算浪费。

Method: 1) 提出AQKA自适应shot分配策略，为KRR和SVM导出闭式最优分配公式（基于梯度与核矩阵值的乘积）；2) 给出完整的预算区间分解，明确不同方法（AQKA、Nyström-QKE、ShoFaR）的最优适用场景；3) 推导修正的稀疏感知Cauchy-Schwarz界和SVM精度上限。

Result: 1) AQKA在预算受限场景（B≤16n_pairs）下主导，N从225增至1000时优势从+8扩大到+25 pts；在ibm_pittsburgh 156量子比特硬件上达+26-32 pts；2) 在ibm_aachen(20数据点)和ibm_berlin(30数据点)上分别取得+17.0±4.8 pts和+14.0±8.5 pts的实时自适应分配优势。

Conclusion: 揭示了shot分配策略对量子核学习性能的关键影响，提供了理论基础和实用算法，为近term量子硬件的核方法部署指明了更高效的路径。

Abstract: Estimating an $N \times N$ quantum kernel from circuit fidelities requires $Θ(N^2 S)$ measurement shots, the dominant bottleneck for deployment on near-term hardware. Existing budget-saving methods (Nyström-QKE, ShoFaR, kernel-target alignment) sub-sample \emph{which} entries to measure but allocate shots \emph{uniformly} within their chosen subset, ignoring how much each entry drives the downstream classifier. We close this gap with two contributions. \textbf{First, a complete regime decomposition} for shot-budgeted quantum kernel learning: a principled menu of when each allocator wins. Our method, \emph{AQKA}, dominates the budget-limited regime ($B \lesssim 16 n_{\mathrm{pairs}}$) on sparse-sensitivity KRR, with the gap \emph{growing} from $+8$ to $+25$ pts over uniform as $N$ scales $225{\to}1000$ and reaching $+26$--$32$ pts on an \texttt{ibm\_pittsburgh} (156-qubit Heron) hardware kernel; Nyström-QKE wins at saturating budgets on planted-sparse via low-rank reconstruction; ShoFaR is competitive only at extreme low budgets. \textbf{Second, a closed-form pair-level acquisition theory}: $s_{ij}^{\star} \propto |g_{ij}|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$ with explicit gradient $g_{ij}$ for KRR (Lemma~1, $|β_iα_j+β_jα_i|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$) and SVM via the envelope theorem ($|η_i^*η_j^*|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$); a \emph{corrected} sparsity-aware Cauchy--Schwarz rate $ρ\le 2m/N$ matching empirics (vs.\ the naive $m^2/N^2$); an explicit-constant plug-in regret bound (Theorem~2); and a tighter SVM ceiling $ρ^{\mathrm{SVM}} \le m_{\mathrm{sv}}^2/N^2$. We close with the first multi-seed live online adaptive shot allocation on quantum hardware: $+17.0 \pm 4.8$ pts at $N{=}20$ on \texttt{ibm\_aachen} ($3.5σ$, 5 seeds), with the advantage holding at $N{=}30$ at higher budget on \texttt{ibm\_berlin} ($+14.0 \pm 8.5$ pts, 5 seeds).

</details>


### [318] [Spontaneous symmetry breaking and Goldstone modes for deep information propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14685)
*Nabil Iqbal,T. Anderson Keller,Yue Song,Takeru Miyato,Max Welling*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度神经网络中连续对称性被自发破缺时产生的类Goldstone模式，该模式能在无需残差连接或归一化等稳定器的情况下，实现深层和前馈网络中的稳定信号传播，提升可训练性和表示多样性，并在循环网络中改善长序列建模性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索深度神经网络中连续对称性自发破缺所产生的类Goldstone模式，为无需残差连接或归一化等架构稳定器的情况下实现稳定的信息传播提供理论基础和实用方法。

Method: 将物理中Goldstone模式的概念引入深度学习，构建内部层具有连续对称等变性的深度神经网络，从理论和实验两方面分析类Goldstone自由度在深层传播中的作用。

Result: 类Goldstone自由度能够在前馈网络中实现稳定的信号传播，提升可训练性和层间表示多样性；在循环网络中，该机制有助于长程信息传播，提升RNN和GRU在长序列任务上的性能。

Conclusion: 连续对称性自发破缺产生的类Goldstone模式为深度网络提供了一种新的稳定信息传播机制，可替代传统架构稳定器，对深层网络的可训练性和循环网络的长程记忆具有重要意义。

Abstract: In physical systems, whenever a continuous symmetry is spontaneously broken, the system possesses excitations called Goldstone modes, which allow coherent information propagation over long distances and times. In this work, we study deep neural networks whose internal layers are equivariant under a continuous symmetry and may therefore support analogous Goldstone-like degrees of freedom. We demonstrate, both analytically and empirically, that these degrees of freedom enable coherent signal propagation across depth and recurrent iterations, providing a mechanism for stable information flow without relying on architectural stabilizers such as residual connections or normalization. In feedforward networks, this results in improved trainability and representational diversity across layers. In recurrent settings, we demonstrate the same mechanism is valuable for long-term memory by propagating information over recurrent iterations, thereby improving performance of RNNs and GRUs on long-sequence modeling tasks.

</details>


### [319] [ReMIA: a Powerful and Efficient Alternative to Membership Inference Attacks against Synthetic Data Generators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14686)
*Davide Scassola,Andrea Coser,Sebastiano Saccani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ReMIA，一种只需两次SDG训练且辅助数据不超过原始数据量的实用隐私度量方法，通过比较两个合成数据集来判断记录来源，在保持与SOTA MIA相当灵敏度的同时大幅提升实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有成员推断攻击（MIA）要么依赖影子建模（需数百次SDG训练）且辅助数据量大，不实用；要么快速但灵敏度不足。需要一种既实用又灵敏的隐私度量方法。

Method: ReMIA仅需两次SDG训练，生成两个合成数据集，然后训练分类器判断给定记录来自哪个源数据集，通过分类准确率衡量隐私风险。

Result: 在多个表格数据集和SDG上的实验表明，ReMIA的灵敏度与SOTA MIA相当，但实用性显著更强。还发现SDG在隐私-效用权衡上优于传统噪声匿名化方法。

Conclusion: ReMIA是一种高效实用的隐私度量指标，可替代计算成本高昂的SOTA MIA，同时为合成数据生成提供更好的隐私评估工具。

Abstract: Tabular data sharing under privacy constraints is increasingly important for research and collaboration. Synthetic data generators (SDGs) are a promising solution, but synthetic data remains vulnerable to attacks, such as membership inference attacks (MIAs), which aim to determine whether a specific record was part of the training data. State-of-the-art MIAs are powerful but impractical: they rely on shadow modeling, requiring hundreds of SDG training runs, and need auxiliary data several times larger than the original training set. Fast proxy metrics like distance to closest record (DCR) are efficient but have limited sensitivity to MIA risk. We introduce ReMIA (Relative Membership Inference Attack), a practical privacy metric that requires only two SDG training runs and additional data no larger than the original training set. Rather than predicting whether a record was in the training set, ReMIA generates two synthetic datasets from two source datasets and measures whether a classifier can identify which source a record came from. Experiments across multiple tabular datasets and SDGs show that ReMIA has a sensitivity comparable to state-of-the-art MIAs while being substantially more practical. We further observe that SDGs can achieve privacy-utility trade-offs that traditional noise-based anonymization methods do not match. Code is available at https://github.com/aindo-com/remia.

</details>


### [320] [The Rate-Distortion-Polysemanticity Tradeoff in SAEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14694)
*Tommaso Mencattini,Francesco Montagna,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了稀疏自编码器（SAE）在学习忠实、高效和可解释表示时的根本矛盾，提出了率-失真-多语义性权衡理论，并证明多语义性本质上是由数据分布决定的，无法完全避免。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAE在追求低失真（准确重建）和低率（高效利用少量特征）时，往往学不到单语义（高度可解释）的表示，这限制了其用于机械可解释性的有效性。作者旨在揭示这三者之间的根本矛盾。

Method: 1) 建立理论框架，刻画率-失真-多语义性之间的权衡关系；2) 在玩具模型设定下，从理论和实验两方面证明限制单语义性必然导致率和失真的增加；3) 假设数据存在生成模型，证明最优SAE的多语义程度由数据分布（尤其是特征共现概率）决定；4) 将分析扩展到真实场景，推导多语义性度量应满足的必要条件，并在LLM训练的SAE上评测现有代理指标。

Result: 1) 单语义性与低率、低失真不可兼得，存在根本性权衡；2) 最优SAE的多语义程度由训练数据中特征共现的概率决定；3) 提出了真实场景下多语义性度量的必要标准，并对现有指标进行了基准测试。

Conclusion: 多语义性本质上是一个"数据问题"，应在架构和优化层面加以解决。这意味着仅靠改进SAE本身无法彻底消除多语义性，还需考虑数据的统计特性。

Abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) that can accurately reconstruct their input (minimizing distortion) by making efficient use of few features (minimizing the rate) often fail to learn monosemantic representations (highly interpretable), limiting their usefulness for mechanistic interpretability. In this paper, we characterise this tension in learning faithful, efficient, and interpretable explanations, introducing the Rate-Distortion-Polysemanticity tradeoff in SAEs. Under toy-modeling assumptions, we theoretically and empirically show that restricting the SAE to be monosemantic necessarily comes with an increase in rate and distortion. Assuming a generative model behind the input observations, we further demonstrate that the degree of polysemanticity of optimal SAEs is determined by the training data distribution, especially by the probability of features to co-occur. Finally, we extend the analysis to real-world settings by deriving necessary conditions that a polysemanticity measure should satisfy when the data-generating process is unknown, and we benchmark existing proxy metrics on SAEs trained on Large Language Models. Taken together, our findings show that polysemanticity is a data problem that should be accounted for when addressing it at the architectural and optimization level.

</details>


### [321] [NeuroAtlas: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Clinical EEG and Brain-Computer Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14698)
*Konstantinos Kontras,Trui Osselaer,Stylianos G. Mouslech,Angeliki-Ilektra Karaiskou,Guido Gagliardi,Thomas Strypsteen,Mohammad Hossein Badiei,Anku Rani,Maarten Vanmarcke,Miguel Bhagubai,Chanakya Ekbote,Jaedong Hwang,Christos Chatzichristos,Paul Pu Liang,Maarten De Vos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeuroAtlas是迄今为止最大的EEG基准测试（42个数据集，26万小时），评估了多种基础模型在EEG任务上的表现。主要发现：EEG专用FM并不优于通用时间序列FM；标准ML指标不足以评估临床效用；模型排名和性能在领域内差异显著。当前模型尚未实现统一的EEG模型承诺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有EEG基础模型评估存在数据集、预处理和指标不一致的问题，常模糊了临床相关性。缺乏统一、大规模、临床相关的EEG基准来系统评估FM在EEG领域的真实效果。

Method: 构建NeuroAtlas基准（42个数据集，26万小时），涵盖临床EEG（癫痫、睡眠医学、脑龄估计）和BCI；引入定制化临床评估指标；对比EEG专用FM与通用时间序列FM及有监督基线。

Result: 1) EEG专用FM未一致优于通用时间序列FM；2) 标准ML指标不足以评估临床效用，需使用更合适的临床指标；3) 模型排名和性能在同一领域内差异显著。

Conclusion: 预训练模型性能大致持平，仅少数具有狭窄优势；当前模型尚未实现统一EEG基础模型的承诺；NeuroAtlas揭示了这一差距，并为下一代统一EEG FM提供了数据集和指标。

Abstract: Foundation models (FMs) promise to extract unified representations that generalize across downstream tasks. They have emerged across fields, including electroencephalography (EEG), but it is less clear how effective they are in this particular field. Published evaluations differ in datasets, in the EEG-specific preprocessing that might influence reported results, and in the reported metrics, frequently obscuring the clinical relevance in EEG. We introduce NeuroAtlas, the largest EEG benchmark to date: 42 datasets and 260k hours covering clinical EEG (epilepsy, sleep medicine, brain age estimation) and brain-computer interfaces, and include multiple datasets per task along with bespoke clinical evaluation metrics. Besides evaluating EEG-FMs with respect to supervised baselines, we present results from generic time-series FMs. We report three findings. First, EEG-specific FMs do not consistently outperform time-series FMs, which have neither EEG-focused architectures nor been pretrained on EEG. Second, standard machine learning metrics are insufficient to assess clinical utility: thus, we thoroughly evaluate more appropriate measures such as the quality of event-level decision-making, hypnogram-derived features, and the brain-age gap in the domains of epilepsy, sleep, and brain age, respectively. Third, model rankings and performance can vary substantially within domains. We conclude that pretrained models perform largely on par, with only narrow advantages for a few, and that current models do not yet deliver on the promise of an out-of-the-box unified EEG model. NeuroAtlas exposes this gap and provides the datasets and metrics for the next generation of unified EEG FMs.

</details>


### [322] [TAPIOCA: Why Task- Aware Pruning Improves OOD model Capability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14738)
*Krish Sharma,Omar Naim,Soumadeep Saha,Nicholas Asher*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究任务感知层剪枝（如TALE）在何种情况下提升模型性能及其原因。实验表明剪枝对分布内数据无益，但能持续改善分布外准确率。机制上，分布外输入会扭曲任务适配的几何结构，剪枝通过移除放大扭曲的层，使分布外表征重新对齐任务适配几何，从而提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究任务感知层剪枝何时以及为何能提升模型性能，特别是其对分布内与分布外数据的不同影响。

Method: 在受控多项式回归任务和大语言模型上进行实验，分析层剪枝对分布内与分布外准确率的影响；通过层范数和成对距离剖面分析表征几何，并利用分布偏移控制和残差缩放干预提供因果证据。

Result: 剪枝对分布内数据无显著提升，但一致改善分布外准确率。分布外输入会扭曲层范数和成对距离剖面，剪枝通过移除放大扭曲的层来缓解这一问题。

Conclusion: 任务感知层剪枝通过校正分布外输入在表征几何上的扭曲来提升性能，该机制在不同规模模型上一致成立。

Abstract: Recent work has promoted task-aware layer pruning as a way to improve model performance on particular tasks, as shown by TALE. In this paper, we investigate when such improvements occur and why. We show first that, across controlled polynomial regression tasks and large language models, such pruning yields no benefit on in-distribution (ID) data but consistently improves out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy. We further show empirically that OOD inputs induce layerwise norm and pairwise-distance profiles that deviate from the corresponding ID profiles. This leads to a geometric explanation of task-aware pruning: each task induces a task-adapted geometry, characterized empirically by the representation profiles observed on ID inputs. OOD inputs can introduce a distorted version of the task-adapted geometry. Task-aware pruning identifies layers that create or amplify this distortion; by removing them, it shifts OOD representational norms and pairwise distances toward those observed on the adapted distribution. This realigns OOD inputs with the model's task-adapted geometry and improves performance. We provide causal evidence through controlled distribution shifts and residual-scaling interventions, and demonstrate consistent behavior across model scales.

</details>


### [323] [Selective Safety Steering via Value-Filtered Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14746)
*Bat-Sheva Einbinder,Hen Davidov,Yee Whye Teh,Yarin Gal,Yaniv Romano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于价值过滤的解码方法（Value-Filtered Decoding），在测试时通过安全奖励约束生成，减少对原本安全内容的不必要干预，同时提升不安全内容的生成安全性，并在安全、有用性和基础模型相似性之间实现更优权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解码时间安全引导方法常常过度干预，修改了本应安全的生成内容，损害了基础模型的有用性、流畅性、风格和连贯性。

Method: 提出价值过滤解码（Value-Filtered Decoding），基于值函数的安全准则筛选token，显式控制错误干预概率，通过单一阈值超参数调节安全与少干预之间的平衡。

Result: 在多个数据集和实验中，所提方法在安全-有用性-基础模型相似性的权衡上优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 价值过滤解码能够有效减少不必要的安全干预，同时提升不安全响应的安全性，为可控文本生成提供了一种更优的测试时安全对齐方案。

Abstract: While large language models (LLMs) are trained to align with human values, their generations may still violate safety constraints. A growing line of work addresses this problem by modifying the model's sampling policy at decoding time using a safety reward. However, existing decoding-time steering methods often intervene unnecessarily, modifying generations that would have been safe under the base model. Such unnecessary interventions are undesirable, as they can distort key properties of the base model such as helpfulness, fluency, style, and coherence. We propose a new test-time steering method designed to reduce such unnecessary interventions while improving the safety of unsafe responses. Our approach filters tokens using a value-based safety criterion and provides an explicit bound on the probability of false interventions. A single threshold hyperparameter controls this bound, allowing practitioners to trade off higher rates of unnecessary intervention for better output safety. Across multiple datasets and experiments, we show that our value-filtered decoding method outperforms existing baselines, achieving better trade-offs between safety, helpfulness, and similarity to the base model.

</details>


### [324] [Cognitive-Uncertainty Guided Knowledge Distillation for Accurate Classification of Student Misconceptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14752)
*Qirui Liu,Hao Chen,Weijie Shi,Jiajie Xu,Jia Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两阶段知识蒸馏框架，通过认知不确定性驱动的双重边界选择机制，仅用10.30%的筛选样本就显著提升了学生模型在数学概念错误识别任务上的性能，解决了数据稀疏、标注噪声和部署困境三大挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学生错误概念识别面临三个核心挑战：1) 真实学生推理数据稀疏且呈长尾分布，难以合成；2) 错误类别间边界模糊，标注噪声高；3) 部署矛盾——大模型因预训练偏见会忽略非常规方法且无法部署在边缘设备，小模型则过拟合噪声。现有方法依赖大规模数据合成增加多样性，但作者希望从现有数据中挖掘高价值样本来解决这些问题。

Method: 提出两阶段知识蒸馏框架。第一阶段：标准蒸馏，将大模型的任务能力迁移给学生模型。第二阶段：引入基于认知不确定性的双重边界选择机制，根据教师模型的不确定性和置信度差异识别四类关键样本；针对不同数据子集设计难度自适应机制，平衡硬标签和软标签的贡献，使学生模型既能继承教师软标签中的类间关系，又能区分模糊错误类型。

Result: 在MAP-Charting数据集上，仅用10.30%的筛选样本进行增强训练，MAP@3达到0.9585（提升17.8%）；在中学代数错误概念基准的跨主题测试中，仅用4B参数模型就达到84.38%准确率，显著优于SOTA大语言模型（67.73%）和标准微调的72B模型（81.25%）。

Conclusion: 本文证明了基于认知不确定性驱动的样本选择策略比大规模数据合成更高效，仅用少量高价值样本就能让学生模型在错误概念识别任务上超越大模型，为小模型部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Accurately identifying student misconceptions is crucial for personalized education but faces three challenges: (1) data scarcity with long-tail distribution, where authentic student reasoning is difficult to synthesize; (2) fuzzy boundaries between error categories with high annotation noise; (3) deployment parado-large models overlook unconventional approaches due to pretraining bias and cannot be deployed on edge, while small models overfit to noise. Unlike traditional methods that increase diversity through large-scale data synthesis, we propose a two-stage knowledge distillation framework that mines high-value samples from existing data. The first stage performs standard distillation to transfer task capabilities. The second stage introduces a dual-layer marginal selection mechanism based on cognitive uncertainty, identifying four types of critical samples based on teacher model uncertainty and confidence differences. For different data subsets, we design difficulty-adaptive mechanism to balance hard/soft label contributions, enabling student models to inherit inter-class relationships from teacher soft labels while distinguishing ambiguous error types. Experiments show that with augmented training on only 10.30% of filtered samples, we achieve MAP@3 of 0.9585 (+17.8%) on the MAP-Charting dataset, and using only a 4B parameter model, we attain 84.38% accuracy on cross-topic tests of middle school algebra misconception benchmarks, significantly outperforming sota LLM (67.73%) and standard fine-tuned 72B models (81.25%). Our code is available at https://github.com/RoschildRui/acl2026_map.

</details>


### [325] [Crys-JEPA: Accelerating Crystal Discovery via Embedding Screening and Generative Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14759)
*Nian Liu,Nikita Kazeev,Stephen Gregory Dale,Artem Maevskiy,Yuwei Zeng,Ryoji Kubo,Pengru Huang,Thomas Laurent,Yann LeCun,Kostya S. Novoselov,Xavier Bresson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对晶体生成模型中存在的稳定性-新颖性权衡问题，提出了一种联合嵌入预测架构Crys-JEPA，通过学习能量感知的潜在空间来规避这一权衡，并构建了筛选-精炼流程，在MP-20和Alex-MP-20数据集上V.S.U.N指标分别提升高达81.4%和82.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有晶体生成模型在最大化观测数据似然时，存在稳定性与新颖性之间的严重权衡：靠近已知分布能保持稳定性但限制新颖性，远离分布则会迅速破坏稳定性。研究者希望突破这一困境，实现同时具备稳定性和新颖性的晶体发现。

Method: 提出Crys-JEPA（联合嵌入预测架构），学习一个能量感知的潜在空间，保留形成能差异信息；将稳定性评估转化为基于嵌入的对比，减少对昂贵能量计算和外部参考的依赖；构建筛选-精炼流程，识别有潜力的生成晶体并反馈优化生成模型。

Result: 在MP-20和Alex-MP-20数据集上，相比基线方法，V.S.U.N指标分别提升高达81.4%和82.6%。

Conclusion: Crys-JEPA有效突破了晶体生成中稳定性-新颖性的权衡困境，为新材料发现提供了一种兼顾二者、且计算高效的生成范式。

Abstract: De novo crystal generation seeks to discover materials that are not merely realistic, but also stable and novel. However, most existing generative models are trained to maximize the likelihood of observed crystals, which encourages samples to stay close to known materials yet not necessarily align with the criteria that matter in discovery. Through an empirical investigation, we show that current crystal generative models are caught in a pronounced stability--novelty trade-off: moving toward the observed distribution preserves stability but limits novelty, whereas moving away from it quickly destroys stability. This suggests that the useful region for discovering crystals that are both stable and novel is extremely narrow. To escape the trade-off, we introduce Crys-JEPA, a joint embedding predictive architecture for crystals that learns an energy-aware latent space preserving formation-energy differences. In this space, stability assessment can be reformulated as an embedding-based comparison against accessible training crystals, reducing the reliance on expensive energy evaluation and task-specific external references. Building on Crys-JEPA, we further develop a screening-and-refinement pipeline that identifies promising generated crystals and reintroduces them to refine the generative model. On MP-20 and Alex-MP-20 datasets, we achieve improvements over baselines up to 81.4% and 82.6% on V.S.U.N metric, respectively.

</details>


### [326] [Compositional Sparsity as an Inductive Bias for Neural Architecture Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14764)
*Hongyu Lin,Antonio Briola,Yuanrong Wang,Tomaso Aste*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将信息过滤网络（IFN）与同调神经网络（HNN）结合，通过提取稀疏依赖结构并映射为固定连接的稀疏神经图，在保持或超越密集基线性能的同时，实现数量级参数压缩、降低方差并减少超参数敏感性，验证了组合稀疏性在高维学习中克服维度灾难的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索深度神经网络能够克服维度灾难的结构先验，验证组合稀疏性（目标函数分解为低维子集上的组成成分）是高维有效学习的关键驱动因素。

Method: 结合信息过滤网络（IFN）通过约束信息最大化提取稀疏依赖结构，再通过同调神经网络（HNN）将推断出的拓扑结构映射为固定连接的稀疏神经图，构建层次化组合的可解释流水线。

Result: HNN比标准DNN稀疏数个数量级，仅需极少超参数调优；在合成任务中恢复底层组合结构且在高维退化场景下保持稳定；在真实数据集上以远少参数匹配或超越密集基线，方差更低，对超参数敏感性更小。

Conclusion: 组合稀疏性是高效高维学习的关键结构先验，基于拓扑推理的固定稀疏连接架构在参数效率、稳定性和泛化能力方面均优于密集网络。

Abstract: Identifying the structural priors that enable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to overcome the curse of dimensionality is a fundamental challenge in machine learning theory. Existing literature suggests that effective high-dimensional learning is driven by compositional sparsity, where target functions decompose into constituents supported on low-dimensional variable subsets. To investigate this hypothesis, we combine Information Filtering Networks (IFNs), which extract sparse dependency structures via constrained information maximisation, with Homological Neural Networks (HNNs), which map the inferred topology into fixed-wiring sparse neural graphs. We formalise the design principles underlying this construction and present an interpretable pipeline in which abstraction emerges through hierarchical composition. HNNs are orders of magnitude sparser than standard DNNs and require only minimal hyperparameter tuning. On synthetic tasks with known sparse hierarchies, HNNs recover the underlying compositional structure and remain stable in regimes where dense alternatives degrade as dimensionality increases. Across a broad suite of real-world datasets, HNNs consistently match or outperform dense baselines while using far fewer parameters, exhibiting lower variance and showing reduced sensitivity to hyperparameters.

</details>


### [327] [Composable Crystals: Controllable Materials Discovery via Concept Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14769)
*Nian Liu,Yuwei Zeng,Ryoji Kubo,Nikita Kazeev,Stephen Gregory Dale,Artem Maevskiy,Pengru Huang,Thomas Laurent,Kostya S. Novoselov,Xavier Bresson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于概念组合的晶体生成框架，通过向量量化变分自编码器自动发现可复用的晶体概念，实现可控探索而非随机采样，在MP-20和Alex-MP-20数据集上V.S.U.N指标分别提升53.2%和51.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有晶体生成方法依赖黑盒随机采样，对生成结构如何超越观测分布的控制能力有限，缺乏可解释性和可控性。

Method: 1）训练向量量化变分自编码器自动发现共享的晶体概念；2）引入组合生成器并通过自生成高质量样本迭代优化；3）用概念组合条件控制下游晶体生成。

Result: 在MP-20和Alex-MP-20上，概念组合使基线模型V.S.U.N指标分别提升53.2%和51.7%，尤其在新颖性方面表现突出。

Conclusion: 概念组合框架能有效提升晶体生成的有效性、稳定性、唯一性和新颖性，实现了可控且可解释的晶体探索。

Abstract: De novo crystal generation, a central task in materials discovery, aims to generate crystals that are simultaneously valid, stable, unique, and novel. Existing methods mainly rely on black-box stochastic sampling, providing limited control over how generated structures move beyond the observed distribution. In this paper, we introduce a concept-based compositional framework for crystal generation. We train a vector-quantized variational autoencoder to automatically discover a shared set of reusable crystal concepts, which serve as building blocks for guided generation. These learned concepts naturally exhibit interpretability from both local atomic environments and global symmetry patterns, and generalize to crystals from different distributions. By recombining such concepts, our framework enables controllable exploration of novel crystals beyond the training distribution, rather than relying solely on unconstrained random sampling. To further improve composition efficiency, we introduce a composition generator and iteratively refine it using high-quality samples generated by the model itself. The resulting concept compositions are then used to condition downstream crystal generation. Numerical experiments on MP-20 and Alex-MP-20 show that compositing concepts separately increase base model up to 53.2% and 51.7% on V.S.U.N metric, with particular gains in novelty.

</details>


### [328] [Beyond What to Select: A Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-Volume Scheduling for Efficient Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14773)
*Suorong Yang,Hanqi Zhu,Hai Gan,Fangjian Su,Guang Li,Furao Shen,Soujanya Poria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PODS框架，通过动态调度数据选择比例（在高-低比例间振荡）来优化训练效率与泛化能力的平衡，无需修改样本评分标准即可兼容现有数据选择方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法只关注"选什么样本"（样本重要性标准），却固定了"选多少数据"（选择比例），忽略了选择比例本身对训练隐式正则化的影响。

Method: 提出PODS框架，在目标选择比例下，交替执行低比例正则化阶段（增强隐式正则化）和高比例恢复阶段（保持数据覆盖与优化稳定性），实现动态数据量调度。

Result: 在ImageNet-1k上训练成本降低50%且准确率提升，LLM指令微调加速2倍以上且性能无损，跨数据集、架构、任务均有效。

Conclusion: 数据选择中的"选多少"（volume scheduling）与"选什么"（sample scoring）同等重要，PODS提供了一种轻量级、即插即用、与现有方法兼容的动态调度方案。

Abstract: Data selection accelerates training by identifying representative training data while preserving model performance. However, existing methods mainly focus on designing sample-importance criteria, i.e., deciding what to select, while typically fixing the selected data volume as the target ratio throughout training. Thus, they are often dynamic in sample identity but static in data volume. In this work, we revisit data selection from an optimization perspective and show that selected-data training induces an implicit regularization effect modulated by the instantaneous selection ratio. This reveals a key trade-off: lower ratios amplify selection-induced regularization, whereas higher ratios preserve data coverage and optimization fidelity. Motivated by this insight, we propose PODS, a Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-volume Scheduling framework. Rather than introducing another sample-scoring metric, PODS serves as a lightweight module that dynamically schedules how much data to select over training. Under the target selection ratio, PODS alternates between low-ratio regularization phases and high-ratio recovery phases to exploit selection-induced regularization without sacrificing optimization stability. With its lightweight, ratio-level, and task-agnostic design, PODS is compatible with existing static and dynamic selection methods and broadly applicable across training paradigms. Experiments across various datasets, architectures, and tasks show that PODS consistently improves the efficiency-generalization trade-off, e.g., reducing ImageNet-1k training cost by 50% with improved accuracy and accelerating LLM instruction tuning by over 2x without performance degradation.

</details>


### [329] [Peng's Q($λ$) for Conservative Value Estimation in Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14779)
*Byeongchan Kim,Min-hwan Oh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CPQL是一种离线多步强化学习算法，通过Peng's Q(λ)算子实现保守值估计，在离线RL和离线到在线学习中都取得了显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线RL中的保守值估计方法（如CQL）仅使用单步Bellman算子，存在过度悲观值估计的问题，且无法充分利用离线轨迹信息。作者希望设计一种多步保守值估计方法，同时避免过度悲观、保证不低于行为策略性能，并提供接近最优的性能保证。

Method: 将Peng's Q(λ)算子引入离线RL作为保守值估计的替代方案。PQL算子的不动点更接近行为策略的值函数，天然引入隐式行为正则化。CPQL通过多步操作同时缓解过度悲观估计，实现不低于行为策略的性能。

Result: 在D4RL基准上，CPQL一致且显著优于现有的离线单步基线方法。在离线到在线学习框架中，CPQL预训练的Q函数使在线PQL智能体避免了微调初期的性能下降，并实现了鲁棒的性能提升。

Conclusion: CPQL是首个在理论上和实验上证明多步保守值估计有效性的离线RL方法，解决了之前保守方法无法同时实现的多个目标，并成功扩展到离线到在线学习场景。

Abstract: We propose a model-free offline multi-step reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm, Conservative Peng's Q($λ$) (CPQL). Our algorithm adapts the Peng's Q($λ$) (PQL) operator for conservative value estimation as an alternative to the Bellman operator. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work in offline RL to theoretically and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of conservative value estimation with a \textit{multi-step} operator by fully leveraging offline trajectories. The fixed point of the PQL operator in offline RL lies closer to the value function of the behavior policy, thereby naturally inducing implicit behavior regularization. CPQL simultaneously mitigates over-pessimistic value estimation, achieves performance greater than (or equal to) that of the behavior policy, and provides near-optimal performance guarantees -- a milestone that previous conservative approaches could not achieve. Extensive numerical experiments on the D4RL benchmark demonstrate that CPQL consistently and significantly outperforms existing offline single-step baselines. In addition to the contributions of CPQL in offline RL, our proposed method also contributes to the offline-to-online learning framework. Using the Q-function pre-trained by CPQL in offline settings enables the online PQL agent to avoid the performance drop typically observed at the start of fine-tuning and to attain robust performance improvements. Our code is available at https://github.com/oh-lab/CPQL.

</details>


### [330] [Understanding Imbalanced Forgetting in Rehearsal-Based Class-Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14785)
*Alberto Tamajo,Srinandan Dasmahapatra,Rahman Attar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了基于回放的类增量学习中存在的非平衡遗忘现象，通过提出三种最后一层系数（分别捕获不同梯度层面的干扰源），发现这些系数能可靠预测各类别的遗忘排名，其中自诱导干扰系数是最强预测因子，为缓解非平衡遗忘提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然回放策略被广泛用于缓解灾难性遗忘，但近期发现即使回放分配均衡，某些类别仍被遗忘得更多。这种非平衡遗忘现象尚未被充分探索，作者旨在系统研究其成因与机制。

Method: 从原理分析出发，构建了三种最后一层系数，分别捕获增量步骤中不同梯度层面的干扰源；通过实证验证这些系数对后续遗忘排名的预测能力，并结合控制实验探究因果关系。

Result: 三种系数联合起来能可靠预测各类别在增量步骤结束时的遗忘排名；自诱导干扰系数是最强预测因子；控制实验表明该系数可能受新类干扰系数影响。

Conclusion: 研究结果为理解非平衡遗忘提供了潜在的机制性解释，并指出通过减少所识别干扰源的类别间差异来缓解非平衡遗忘是可行的研究方向。

Abstract: Neural networks suffer from catastrophic forgetting in class-incremental learning (CIL) settings.
